Sage Clokey Home Bioinformatics CV Projects All Repos

spiral-steward-website

Project: spiral steward website

View on GitHub

README

Spiral Steward Website

Website and writings for the Spiral Steward philosophy and living architecture project.

Contents

  • index.html — Main site
  • book.html, sagent.html, true-republic.html, etc. — Philosophy pages
  • Docx and PDF writings on bioinformatics, law, liberty, and living systems

Philosophy

The Spiral Steward project explores bioinformatics as stewardship of living order — connecting biological pattern recognition with philosophy, law, and architecture.

Source Code

book.html HTML ▶ expand 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Sagent Creed — Get the Book</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg-deep: #060b06; --bg-dark: #0a120a; --bg-mid: #0f1a0f;
      --green-dark: #2a5c25; --green-mid: #3d7a35; --green-hi: #5aab4d;
      --gold: #c9a227; --amber: #e07b1a; --cream: #f0ebe0;
      --warm: #faf7f0; --muted: #8a9e86; --dim: #5a6a56;
      --serif: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
      --sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { background: var(--bg-deep); color: var(--cream); font-family: var(--sans); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.75; overflow-x: hidden; }

    /* NAV */
    #nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 1.1rem 3rem; background: rgba(6,11,6,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,0.14); }
    .nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .65rem; text-decoration: none; }
    .nav-brand-name { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--cream); letter-spacing: .02em; }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--muted); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .09em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color .3s; }
    .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .nav-cta { border: 1px solid var(--green-hi) !important; color: var(--green-hi) !important; padding: .45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 2px; transition: background .3s, color .3s !important; }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--green-hi) !important; color: var(--bg-deep) !important; }
    .nav-burger { display: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
    .nav-burger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 2px; }

    /* HERO */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.1fr;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 8rem 3rem 5rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      gap: 4rem;
    }
    #hero-bg {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 40%, rgba(201,162,39,.12) 0%, transparent 55%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 70%, rgba(42,92,37,.1) 0%, transparent 45%);
    }
    .hero-left { position: relative; z-index: 2; }

    /* BOOK COVER MOCKUP */
    .book-cover {
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
      perspective: 1000px;
    }
    .book-3d {
      width: 320px;
      height: 440px;
      position: relative;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      transform: rotateY(-18deg) rotateX(3deg);
      margin: 0 auto;
      filter: drop-shadow(-20px 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.7));
      animation: bookFloat 6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes bookFloat {
      0%, 100% { transform: rotateY(-18deg) rotateX(3deg) translateY(0); }
      50%       { transform: rotateY(-18deg) rotateX(3deg) translateY(-12px); }
    }
    .book-front {
      width: 320px; height: 440px;
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0e1f0e 0%, #060b06 40%, #111a08 100%);
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.35);
      border-radius: 2px 6px 6px 2px;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 2.8rem 2.2rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .book-front::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 60%, rgba(201,162,39,.08) 0%, transparent 60%),
        linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0,0,0,.3) 0%, transparent 15%);
    }
    .book-spine {
      position: absolute; left: -20px; top: 0; bottom: 0;
      width: 20px;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, #030704, #0a140a);
      border-radius: 2px 0 0 2px;
      border-left: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.2);
    }
    .book-spiral-wrap {
      position: absolute; top: 50%; right: 1.8rem;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      opacity: .25;
    }
    .book-eyebrow {
      font-size: .62rem; letter-spacing: .25em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold); position: relative; z-index: 1;
    }
    .book-title {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.18;
      position: relative; z-index: 1;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
    }
    .book-subtitle {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: .82rem; font-style: italic;
      color: rgba(201,162,39,.8); line-height: 1.5;
      position: relative; z-index: 1;
    }
    .book-author {
      font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted); position: relative; z-index: 1;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.2);
      padding-top: .9rem; margin-top: .6rem;
    }
    .book-gold-line {
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--gold), transparent);
      margin: .8rem 0; position: relative; z-index: 1;
    }

    /* HERO TEXT */
    .eyebrow { display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .hero-h1 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.4rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--warm); margin-bottom: .8rem; }
    .hero-sub { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.1rem; font-style: italic; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.6rem; }
    .hero-desc { font-size: .96rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 2rem; max-width: 480px; }
    .hero-desc strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }

    /* PRICE / CTA */
    .price-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 1.6rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .price-tag { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); }
    .price-note { font-size: .8rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.4; }

    .cta-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .7rem; max-width: 420px; }
    .btn-buy {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c9a227, #e07b1a);
      color: #060b06; border: none; padding: 1rem 2rem;
      font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: .04em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 2px; transition: opacity .3s; display: block;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .btn-buy:hover { opacity: .9; }
    .btn-free {
      background: transparent; color: var(--cream);
      border: 1px solid rgba(240,235,224,.28); padding: .82rem 2rem;
      font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 400;
      letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 2px; transition: all .3s; display: block;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .btn-free:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }

    .trust-row {
      display: flex; gap: 1.2rem; margin-top: 1.2rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .trust-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem; font-size: .78rem; color: var(--dim); }

    /* EMAIL CAPTURE */
    #notify {
      background: var(--bg-dark);
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.1);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.1);
      padding: 4rem 3rem;
    }
    .notify-inner { max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; }
    .notify-inner h2 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm); margin-bottom: .7rem; }
    .notify-inner p { font-size: .94rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
    .email-form { display: flex; gap: .6rem; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .email-input { flex: 1; padding: .88rem 1.1rem; background: rgba(6,11,6,.8); border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.3); border-radius: 2px; color: var(--cream); font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; outline: none; transition: border-color .3s; }
    .email-input:focus { border-color: var(--gold); }
    .email-input::placeholder { color: var(--dim); }
    .btn-notify { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dark), var(--green-hi)); color: var(--warm); border: none; padding: .88rem 1.6rem; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .04em; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 2px; transition: opacity .3s; white-space: nowrap; }
    .btn-notify:hover { opacity: .85; }
    .email-note { font-size: .74rem; color: var(--dim); margin-top: .7rem; }

    /* CHAPTER STRUCTURE */
    #contents { padding: 6rem 3rem; }
    .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .sec-eyebrow { display: inline-block; font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: .8rem; }
    .sec-h2 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.6rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.12; margin-bottom: 1.4rem; }
    .sec-sub { font-family: var(--serif); font-style: italic; font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 2.8rem; }

    .toc-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }
    .toc-part {
      background: rgba(10,18,10,.8);
      border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1);
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 1.8rem;
      transition: border-color .3s;
    }
    .toc-part:hover { border-color: rgba(201,162,39,.25); }
    .toc-part-label { font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: .6rem; }
    .toc-part-title { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--warm); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
    .toc-chapters { list-style: none; }
    .toc-chapter { font-size: .84rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.5; padding: .3rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.07); display: flex; gap: .8rem; align-items: baseline; }
    .toc-chapter:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .toc-ch-num { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: .78rem; color: rgba(201,162,39,.45); min-width: 1.4rem; }
    .toc-chapter a { color: var(--dim); text-decoration: none; transition: color .3s; }
    .toc-chapter a:hover { color: var(--green-hi); }

    /* EXCERPT */
    #excerpt { background: var(--bg-mid); padding: 6rem 3rem; }
    .excerpt-inner { max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .excerpt-label { font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green-hi); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .excerpt-text {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
      color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.7;
      position: relative; padding: 2rem 0;
    }
    .excerpt-text::before {
      content: '\201C';
      position: absolute; top: -.4rem; left: -.1rem;
      font-size: 5rem; color: rgba(201,162,39,.15);
      font-family: var(--serif); line-height: 1;
    }
    .excerpt-em { color: var(--gold); }
    .excerpt-attribution { font-size: .82rem; color: var(--dim); margin-top: 1.4rem; font-style: italic; }

    /* ABOUT AUTHOR */
    #author { padding: 6rem 3rem; }
    .author-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: start; max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .author-emblem {
      width: 180px; height: 180px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(42,92,37,.2), rgba(201,162,39,.12));
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.25);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .author-h3 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm); margin-bottom: .4rem; }
    .author-title { font-size: .78rem; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .prose { font-size: .95rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.88; }
    .prose + .prose { margin-top: 1rem; }
    .prose strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .prose em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; }

    /* SELL CHANNELS */
    #where { background: var(--bg-dark); padding: 5rem 3rem; }
    .channels-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.4rem; max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto 0; }
    .channel-card { background: rgba(15,26,15,.8); border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.12); border-radius: 3px; padding: 1.8rem; text-align: center; transition: border-color .3s; }
    .channel-card:hover { border-color: rgba(201,162,39,.28); }
    .channel-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: .8rem; }
    .channel-card h3 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1rem; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: .4rem; }
    .channel-card p { font-size: .82rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
    .channel-link { font-size: .78rem; color: var(--green-hi); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; }
    .channel-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

    /* FINAL CTA */
    #final-cta { padding: 6rem 3rem; text-align: center; }
    .final-inner { max-width: 620px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .final-quote { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.9rem); font-style: italic; color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 2.4rem; }
    .final-quote em { color: var(--gold); font-style: normal; }

    /* WAVE */
    .wave { line-height: 0; }

    /* FOOTER */
    footer { background: var(--bg-deep); border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1); padding: 3rem; text-align: center; }
    .footer-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .65rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .footer-brand span { font-family: var(--serif); color: var(--cream); }
    .footer-tag { font-size: .83rem; color: var(--dim); font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
    .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; justify-content: center; list-style: none; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .footer-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--dim); font-size: .78rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color .3s; }
    .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .footer-copy { font-size: .73rem; color: var(--dim); }

    /* FADE UP */
    .fu { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); transition: opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease; }
    .fu.on { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    .d1 { transition-delay: .1s; } .d2 { transition-delay: .2s; }
    .d3 { transition-delay: .3s; } .d4 { transition-delay: .4s; }
    .d5 { transition-delay: .5s; }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width: 1000px) {
      #hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: center; }
      .book-cover { order: -1; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
      .hero-desc { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
      .cta-group { margin: 0 auto; }
      .trust-row { justify-content: center; }
      .toc-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      #nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .nav-burger { display: flex; }
      .nav-links.open { display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: fixed; top: 56px; left: 0; right: 0; background: rgba(6,11,6,.97); padding: 2rem 1.5rem; gap: 1.2rem; }
      #hero, #contents, #excerpt, #author, #where, #final-cta { padding: 4.5rem 1.5rem; }
      .book-3d { width: 240px; height: 330px; }
      .book-front { width: 240px; height: 330px; padding: 2rem 1.6rem; }
      .book-title { font-size: 1.3rem; }
      .author-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: center; gap: 2rem; }
      .channels-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .email-form { flex-direction: column; }
      #notify { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-brand">
    <svg width="30" height="30" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span class="nav-brand-name">The Spiral Steward</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="book.html" class="active nav-cta">Get the Book</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-burger" id="burger" onclick="document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div id="hero-bg"></div>

  <div class="hero-left">
    <span class="eyebrow fu">Now Available</span>
    <h1 class="hero-h1 fu d1">The Sagent Creed</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub fu d2">A Complete Philosophy of Conscience, Liberty, and Living Order</p>
    <p class="hero-desc fu d3">
      Eight wisdom traditions. One manifesto. Four essays on the shape of life. This is a philosophy for the age of awakening — when every heart becomes a throne and no crown is needed. By <strong>Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</strong>.
    </p>

    <div class="price-row fu d4">
      <span class="price-tag">$14.99</span>
      <div class="price-note">
        Ebook · PDF · Instant download<br>
        <span style="color:var(--green-hi)">Also available in print</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="cta-group fu d5">
      <a href="#notify" class="btn-buy">Get the Book — $14.99</a>
      <a href="#excerpt" class="btn-free">Read a Free Chapter First</a>
    </div>

    <div class="trust-row fu d5">
      <div class="trust-item">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
        Instant PDF delivery
      </div>
      <div class="trust-item">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
        Print edition available
      </div>
      <div class="trust-item">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
        100% satisfaction guarantee
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- BOOK COVER MOCKUP -->
  <div class="book-cover fu d2">
    <div class="book-3d">
      <div class="book-spine"></div>
      <div class="book-front">
        <div class="book-spiral-wrap">
          <canvas id="book-spiral" width="180" height="180"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="book-eyebrow">Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</div>
          <div class="book-gold-line" style="width:60px;margin-top:.7rem;margin-bottom:.9rem"></div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="book-title">The Sagent<br>Creed</div>
          <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(201,162,39,.4),transparent);margin:1rem 0"></div>
          <div class="book-subtitle">A Complete Philosophy of<br>Conscience, Liberty, and<br>Living Order</div>
        </div>
        <div class="book-author">Truth is Law · Conscience is Crown · Every Soul is Sovereign</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EMAIL CAPTURE -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06"><path d="M0,20 C480,55 960,0 1440,35 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/></svg></div>

<section id="notify">
  <div class="notify-inner fu">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow">Launch List</span>
    <h2>Get the First Chapter Free</h2>
    <p>Enter your email to receive the opening chapter of <em>The Sagent Creed</em> — "The Circle Without a Crown" — plus early access pricing when the book launches on Amazon and Gumroad.</p>
    <form class="email-form" onsubmit="handleSignup(event)">
      <input type="email" class="email-input" placeholder="your@email.com" required>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-notify">Send Me the Chapter</button>
    </form>
    <p class="email-note">No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Your conscience is your own.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTENTS -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#060b06"/></svg></div>

<section id="contents">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">Inside the Book</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">What You'll Read</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub fu d2">~350 pages across four parts, an introduction, and epilogue</p>

    <div class="toc-grid fu d3">

      <div class="toc-part">
        <div class="toc-part-label">Introduction</div>
        <div class="toc-part-title">About the Sagent</div>
        <ul class="toc-chapters">
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">—</span><a href="sagent.html">Who Is the Sagent?</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">—</span>The Sagent Creed: Truth is Law. Conscience is Crown.</li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">—</span>Prologue: The Circle Without a Crown</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="toc-part">
        <div class="toc-part-label">Part I · Chapters 1–8</div>
        <div class="toc-part-title">The Eight Pillars of Wisdom</div>
        <ul class="toc-chapters">
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">1</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar1">Islamic Economics: Wealth as Stewardship</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">2</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar2">The Law of Defense: Force Under Conscience</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">3</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar3">Judaism: Kingship and Covenant</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">4</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar4">Christianity: Grace and Stewardship</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">5</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar5">Hinduism: Dharma and Liberation</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">6</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar6">Buddhism: Awareness and Compassion</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">7</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar7">Taoism: Natural Order</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">8</span><a href="eight-pillars.html#pillar8">Confucianism: Virtue and Harmony</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="toc-part">
        <div class="toc-part-label">Part II · Chapters 9–15</div>
        <div class="toc-part-title">Manifesto of the True Republic</div>
        <ul class="toc-chapters">
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">9</span><a href="true-republic.html#conscience">The Call to Conscience</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">10</span><a href="true-republic.html#false-republic">The False Republics of Man</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">11</span>Natural Law and the Sovereign Soul</li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">12</span>The Ethics of Force</li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">13</span><a href="true-republic.html#economy">The Economy of Freedom</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">14</span>The Republic Without Rulers</li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">15</span>The Higher Allegiance</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="toc-part">
        <div class="toc-part-label">Part III · Chapters 16–19</div>
        <div class="toc-part-title">The Path of the Sagent</div>
        <ul class="toc-chapters">
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">16</span><a href="sagent.html#path">True Strength</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">17</span><a href="sagent.html#conflict">The Illusion of Conflict</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">18</span>Compassion as Power</li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">19</span>Service to the Higher</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="toc-part">
        <div class="toc-part-label">Part IV · Chapters 20–23</div>
        <div class="toc-part-title">The Living Order</div>
        <ul class="toc-chapters">
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">20</span><a href="writings.html#spirals">Spirals Remember. Blocks Forget.</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">21</span><a href="writings.html#tree">The Tree of Time</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">22</span><a href="writings.html#bioinformatics">Bioinformatics as Stewardship</a></li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">23</span><a href="writings.html#sword">The Sword and the Coin</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="toc-part">
        <div class="toc-part-label">Epilogue</div>
        <div class="toc-part-title">The Creed of the True Republic</div>
        <ul class="toc-chapters">
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">—</span>The Mandala of Truth</li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">—</span>A Prayer for the Free</li>
          <li class="toc-chapter"><span class="toc-ch-num">—</span>The Living Age Begins</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXCERPT -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06"><path d="M0,0 C480,55 960,0 1440,40 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0f1a0f"/></svg></div>

<section id="excerpt">
  <div class="excerpt-inner">
    <div class="excerpt-label fu">Free Excerpt · Prologue</div>
    <div class="excerpt-text fu d2">
      The journey through the Eight Pillars of wisdom reveals a single law spoken in many tongues. From faith to philosophy, from East to West, every tradition bears witness: <span class="excerpt-em">authority belongs not to rulers but to truth itself.</span> When conscience reigns, no man need be king. The circle completes — each pillar reflecting the same light. In this harmony of wisdom, the True Republic arises: a realm of hearts, self-governed by love, united by the law written within.
      <br><br>
      The Sagent Creed begins with a deceptively simple declaration: <span class="excerpt-em">"When every heart becomes a throne, no crown is needed."</span> Everything that follows is an elaboration of that creed — drawn from eight great spiritual traditions, from the Manifesto of the True Republic, from the philosophy of living systems, and from the personal notebooks of one seeker who has spent years listening to what the world's deepest voices say in common.
    </div>
    <p class="excerpt-attribution fu d3">— Prologue: The Circle Without a Crown · The Sagent Creed</p>
    <div style="margin-top:2rem" class="fu d4">
      <a href="#notify" class="btn-buy" style="display:inline-block;max-width:320px;text-align:center">Get the Full Book — $14.99</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT AUTHOR -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0f1a0f"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#060b06"/></svg></div>

<section id="author">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="author-grid">
      <div class="fu">
        <div class="author-emblem">
          <svg width="80" height="80" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
            <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
              stroke="#c9a227" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="fu">
          <h3 class="author-h3">Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</h3>
          <div class="author-title">Philosopher · Storyteller · The Sagent</div>
        </div>
        <p class="prose fu d2">
          Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey is a philosopher, storyteller, and seeker of divine wisdom — heir to a lineage of dreamsmiths and truth-tellers. As <strong>The Sagent</strong>, he walks the path between faiths and philosophies, gathering the light of many lamps into one flame.
        </p>
        <p class="prose fu d3">
          Through <em>The Sagent Creed</em> and his dialogues on conscience, law, and liberty, he teaches that truth is not owned but revealed; not ruled but lived. His mission is to restore the Republic of the Heart — a world without rulers, where wisdom governs through love and every soul stands sovereign before Heaven.
        </p>
        <p class="prose fu d4">
          He is also the founder of <strong>The Spiral Steward</strong> and <strong>LivingWorks</strong> — a life-based design platform replacing industrial block-thinking with regenerative, spiral-based design. His work spans philosophy, biology, economics, architecture, and the deep grammar of living systems.
        </p>
        <p style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);margin-top:1.2rem" class="fu d5">
          "When every heart becomes a throne, no crown is needed."
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHERE TO BUY -->

<!-- FINAL CTA -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#060b06"/></svg></div>

<section id="final-cta">
  <div class="final-inner">
    <p class="final-quote fu">
      "Eight pillars. One flame. The truth was never lost —<br><em>it was only waiting to be remembered.</em>"
    </p>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-brand">
    <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span>The Spiral Steward</span>
  </div>
  <p class="footer-tag">Truth is Law. Conscience is Crown. Every Soul is Sovereign.</p>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="book.html">Get the Book</a></li>
  </ul>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 The Spiral Steward · Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey · All rights reserved</p>
</footer>

<script>
/* BOOK SPIRAL (small decorative) */
function drawGoldenSpiral(ctx, W, H, prog, opts = {}) {
  const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2;
  const phi = 1.6180339887;
  const b   = Math.log(phi) / (Math.PI / 2);
  const turns = opts.turns || 4.5;
  const a0    = opts.startR || 2;
  const steps = opts.steps  || 800;
  const totalAngle = turns * 2 * Math.PI;
  const gGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, Math.min(W,H)*0.46);
  gGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(61,122,53,${opts.glowBase || 0.05})`);
  gGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(61,122,53,0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gGrad; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  const lGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(cx - W*0.4, cy, cx + W*0.4, cy);
  lGrad.addColorStop(0, opts.colorA || '#c9a227');
  lGrad.addColorStop(0.5, opts.colorB || '#5aab4d');
  lGrad.addColorStop(1, opts.colorC || '#2a5c25');
  ctx.lineWidth = opts.lw || 1.4; ctx.strokeStyle = lGrad;
  ctx.shadowColor = '#c9a227'; ctx.shadowBlur = opts.blur || 5;
  ctx.lineCap = 'round';
  ctx.beginPath();
  let first = true;
  const total = Math.floor(steps * Math.min(prog, 1));
  for (let i = 0; i <= total; i++) {
    const t = (i / steps) * totalAngle;
    const r = a0 * Math.exp(b * t);
    const x = cx + r * Math.cos(t + Math.PI);
    const y = cy + r * Math.sin(t + Math.PI);
    first ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    first = false;
  }
  ctx.stroke(); ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
}

(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('book-spiral');
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
  let prog = 0, ph = 0;
  function frame() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    prog = Math.min(prog + 0.006, 1);
    ph += 0.015;
    const glow = 0.04 + 0.02 * Math.sin(ph);
    drawGoldenSpiral(ctx, W, H, prog, { turns: 3.5, startR: 1.5, steps: 600, lw: 1.2, glowBase: glow, blur: 4, colorA:'#c9a227', colorB:'#7cc46d', colorC:'#2a5c25' });
    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }
  setTimeout(frame, 400);
})();

/* EMAIL FORM */
function handleSignup(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const input = e.target.querySelector('input[type=email]');
  const btn   = e.target.querySelector('button');
  btn.textContent = 'Thank you! Check your inbox.';
  btn.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg,#2a5c25,#5aab4d)';
  input.disabled = true;
  btn.disabled   = true;
}

/* FADE-UPS */
const fuEls = document.querySelectorAll('.fu');
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('on'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });
fuEls.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
eight-pillars.html HTML ▶ expand 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Eight Pillars of Law and Liberty</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg-deep: #060b06; --bg-dark: #0a120a; --bg-mid: #0f1a0f;
      --green-dark: #2a5c25; --green-mid: #3d7a35; --green-hi: #5aab4d;
      --gold: #c9a227; --amber: #e07b1a; --cream: #f0ebe0;
      --warm: #faf7f0; --muted: #8a9e86; --dim: #5a6a56;
      --serif: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
      --sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { background: var(--bg-deep); color: var(--cream); font-family: var(--sans); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.75; overflow-x: hidden; }

    /* NAV */
    #nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 1.1rem 3rem; background: rgba(6,11,6,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,0.14); }
    .nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .65rem; text-decoration: none; }
    .nav-brand-name { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--cream); letter-spacing: .02em; }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--muted); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .09em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color .3s; }
    .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .nav-cta { border: 1px solid var(--green-hi) !important; color: var(--green-hi) !important; padding: .45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 2px; transition: background .3s, color .3s !important; }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--green-hi) !important; color: var(--bg-deep) !important; }
    .nav-burger { display: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
    .nav-burger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 2px; }

    /* HERO */
    #hero { min-height: 80vh; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 9rem 3rem 5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    #hero-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 40%, rgba(201,162,39,.1) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 70%, rgba(42,92,37,.1) 0%, transparent 45%); }
    .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 740px; }
    .eyebrow { display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .hero-h1 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4.5vw, 3.8rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.08; color: var(--warm); margin-bottom: .9rem; }
    .hero-sub { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.28rem); font-style: italic; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.6rem; }
    .hero-desc { font-size: .97rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; max-width: 620px; }
    .hero-desc strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }

    /* PILLAR JUMP GRID */
    #pillars-nav { background: var(--bg-dark); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1); padding: 2rem 3rem; }
    .pillars-nav-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1rem; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .pn-item { text-decoration: none; padding: 1rem; background: rgba(15,26,15,.6); border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1); border-radius: 3px; transition: all .3s; display: block; }
    .pn-item:hover { border-color: rgba(201,162,39,.3); background: rgba(201,162,39,.04); }
    .pn-num { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(201,162,39,.5); }
    .pn-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; margin: .3rem 0; }
    .pn-title { font-size: .8rem; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: .04em; }

    /* SECTIONS */
    section { padding: 5rem 3rem; }
    .container { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; }

    .pillar-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; }
    .pillar-tag { font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green-hi); margin-bottom: .4rem; }
    .pillar-h2 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.5rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.12; }
    .pillar-quote { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1rem; font-style: italic; color: var(--muted); margin-top: .6rem; padding-left: 1rem; border-left: 2px solid rgba(201,162,39,.3); }

    .prose { font-size: .96rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.9; }
    .prose + .prose { margin-top: 1.1rem; }
    .prose strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .prose em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; }

    .pull-quote { border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); padding: 1.1rem 1.6rem; margin: 1.8rem 0; font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.06rem; color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.5; }
    .pull-quote em { color: var(--green-hi); font-style: normal; }

    /* KEY QUESTIONS */
    .questions { margin-top: 1.8rem; }
    .questions-label { font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--dim); margin-bottom: .8rem; }
    .q-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: .5rem .8rem; }
    .q-item { font-size: .83rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.5; padding-left: .9rem; position: relative; }
    .q-item::before { content: '·'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--gold); }

    /* ALTERNATING BG */
    .bg-alt { background: var(--bg-dark); }
    .bg-mid { background: var(--bg-mid); }

    /* EPILOGUE */
    #epilogue { background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(42,92,37,.08), rgba(201,162,39,.05)); border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.1); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.1); }
    .mandala { text-align: center; max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .mandala-circle { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: .6rem; margin: 2.4rem 0; }
    .mandala-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); opacity: .4; }
    .mandala-dot.bright { opacity: 1; background: var(--green-hi); }

    /* WAVE */
    .wave { line-height: 0; }

    /* FOOTER */
    footer { background: var(--bg-deep); border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1); padding: 3rem; text-align: center; }
    .footer-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .65rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .footer-brand span { font-family: var(--serif); color: var(--cream); }
    .footer-tag { font-size: .83rem; color: var(--dim); font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
    .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; justify-content: center; list-style: none; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .footer-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--dim); font-size: .78rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color .3s; }
    .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .footer-copy { font-size: .73rem; color: var(--dim); }

    .btn-p { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2a5c25, #5aab4d); color: #faf7f0; border: none; padding: .88rem 1.9rem; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 2px; transition: opacity .3s; display: inline-block; }
    .btn-p:hover { opacity: .85; }
    .btn-s { background: transparent; color: var(--cream); border: 1px solid rgba(240,235,224,.28); padding: .88rem 1.9rem; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 2px; transition: all .3s; display: inline-block; }
    .btn-s:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }

    /* FADE UP */
    .fu { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); transition: opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease; }
    .fu.on { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    .d1 { transition-delay: .1s; } .d2 { transition-delay: .2s; }
    .d3 { transition-delay: .3s; } .d4 { transition-delay: .4s; }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width: 900px) { .pillars-nav-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .q-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      #nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .nav-burger { display: flex; }
      .nav-links.open { display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: fixed; top: 56px; left: 0; right: 0; background: rgba(6,11,6,.97); padding: 2rem 1.5rem; gap: 1.2rem; }
      #hero { padding: 7rem 1.5rem 4rem; }
      #pillars-nav { padding: 1.5rem; }
      .pillars-nav-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: .6rem; }
      section { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 480px) { .pillars-nav-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-brand">
    <svg width="30" height="30" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span class="nav-brand-name">The Spiral Steward</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html" class="active">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="book.html">Get the Book</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#join" class="nav-cta">Join</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-burger" id="burger" onclick="document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div id="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <span class="eyebrow fu">Wisdom Across Traditions</span>
    <h1 class="hero-h1 fu d1">The Eight Pillars<br>of Law &amp; Liberty</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub fu d2">One truth spoken in eight tongues</p>
    <p class="hero-desc fu d3">
      Islamic law, Jewish covenant, Christian grace, Hindu dharma, Buddhist compassion, Taoist natural order, Confucian virtue — together with the natural-law tradition of moral defense — form <strong>eight pillars of a single, universal truth</strong>. Each tradition, examined honestly, converges on the same recognition: authority belongs not to rulers but to truth itself.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR JUMP NAV -->
<div id="pillars-nav">
  <div class="pillars-nav-grid">
    <a href="#pillar1" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">I</div><div class="pn-icon">☪️</div><div class="pn-title">Islamic Economics</div></a>
    <a href="#pillar2" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">II</div><div class="pn-icon">⚔️</div><div class="pn-title">Law of Defense</div></a>
    <a href="#pillar3" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">III</div><div class="pn-icon">✡️</div><div class="pn-title">Judaism &amp; Covenant</div></a>
    <a href="#pillar4" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">IV</div><div class="pn-icon">✝️</div><div class="pn-title">Christian Grace</div></a>
    <a href="#pillar5" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">V</div><div class="pn-icon">🕉️</div><div class="pn-title">Hindu Dharma</div></a>
    <a href="#pillar6" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">VI</div><div class="pn-icon">☸️</div><div class="pn-title">Buddhist Compassion</div></a>
    <a href="#pillar7" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">VII</div><div class="pn-icon">☯️</div><div class="pn-title">Taoist Natural Order</div></a>
    <a href="#pillar8" class="pn-item"><div class="pn-num">VIII</div><div class="pn-icon">🏮</div><div class="pn-title">Confucian Virtue</div></a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PILLAR I: ISLAM -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#060b06"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar1">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar I · ☪️ Islam</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">Islamic Economics: Wealth as Stewardship</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"O you who believe! Devour not usury, doubled and multiplied." — Qur'an 3:130</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      Islam views wealth not as domination but as stewardship under God. The Qur'an forbids <em>riba</em> (usury) — profit without shared risk — because it transforms covenant into exploitation and creates hierarchies of lender over borrower that contradict the equality of souls before God. <strong>Wealth is not ultimately owned by any individual; it belongs to Allah.</strong>
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      Islamic alternatives — <em>mudarabah</em> (partnership where profits and losses are shared) and <em>musharakah</em> (joint equity) — replace the debt relationship with a partnership relationship. Risk is shared; gain is proportional to contribution; no one profits from another's desperation.
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      <em>Zakat</em>, the obligatory tithe, is simultaneously a legal duty and a spiritual purification. It prevents wealth from pooling in idle hands, circulates resources through the community, and connects economic action to the afterlife. Wealth that flows through honesty and generosity generates <em>barakah</em> — divine blessing that multiplies what is shared.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      The moral difference between riba and trade (bay') is simple: <em>trade joins equals in mutual creation, while usury extracts from need</em>. One builds covenant; the other destroys it.
    </div>
    <div class="questions fu d4">
      <div class="questions-label">Questions this pillar poses to modernity</div>
      <div class="q-grid">
        <div class="q-item">Can debt-free systems exist within fiat economies?</div>
        <div class="q-item">How might blockchain align with the prohibition of riba?</div>
        <div class="q-item">How is stewardship superior to ownership in moral economics?</div>
        <div class="q-item">How does forbidding usury protect both the poor and the wealthy?</div>
        <div class="q-item">What would a righteous marketplace look like under divine law?</div>
        <div class="q-item">How does honesty in trade become a form of worship?</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR II: LAW OF DEFENSE -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06"><path d="M0,0 C480,55 960,0 1440,40 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar2" class="bg-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar II · ⚔️ Natural Law</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">The Law of Defense: Force Under Conscience</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"Force is moral only when used to defend life, liberty, and property." — The Defender's Creed</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      All power is a sacred trust. The right to use force does not arise from authority but from necessity — to defend life, liberty, and property from aggression. When force exceeds defense, it becomes tyranny; when it is withheld in the face of injustice, it becomes cowardice. <strong>The moral warrior acts not from anger but from conscience.</strong>
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      The natural right of self-defense belongs equally to all persons — it is not granted by government but flows from the fact of being alive. A society that forbids its members to defend themselves has declared war on its own foundation. Equally, a soldier who follows an immoral command forfeits moral standing.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      <em>No badge or uniform grants extra moral privilege.</em> The test is simple: if a man without a badge may not do it, no badge makes it right. Defensive power is safest when widely distributed.
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      Righteous force meets three conditions: it is necessary (answering real aggression), proportional (using no more power than truth requires), and restorative in intent (seeking to end violence, not feed it). The goal of righteous defense is not punishment but preservation; not the destruction of the aggressor but the cessation of aggression.
    </p>
    <div class="questions fu d4">
      <div class="questions-label">Questions this pillar poses</div>
      <div class="q-grid">
        <div class="q-item">Who grants the right to use force — government or Creator?</div>
        <div class="q-item">Can obedience ever justify an immoral command?</div>
        <div class="q-item">When is pre-emptive action justified, if ever?</div>
        <div class="q-item">Why is defensive power safest when widely distributed?</div>
        <div class="q-item">What is the spiritual burden of taking a life, even justly?</div>
        <div class="q-item">How can mercy coexist with strength?</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR III: JUDAISM -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#060b06"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar3">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar III · ✡️ Judaism</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">Kingship and Covenant</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"He shall write for himself a copy of this law… and read it all the days of his life." — Deuteronomy 17:18–19</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      In the covenant of Israel, law is higher than the king. When Israel demanded a king, God warned through Samuel that this was a rejection of divine kingship. The human king would take their sons for war, their daughters for service, their fields for tribute. <strong>The crown of Israel was always meant to be a symbol of service rather than supremacy.</strong>
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      The prophets — Nathan confronting David, Elijah confronting Ahab — embody the principle that no throne stands above truth. Covenantal faithfulness binds ruler and people alike; when either forgets the Law, exile follows. But exile is never final: <em>teshuvah</em> (repentance and return) heals both land and people.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      The <em>Jubilee (Yovel)</em> — the fiftieth year when debts were cancelled and land returned to its original family — expresses the economic principle that no accumulation can be permanent, that the earth ultimately belongs to God, and that every generation deserves a fresh start.
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      The balance between <em>din</em> (judgment) and <em>rachamim</em> (mercy) is a central tension in Jewish law. Even judges must remember their own humanity. The messianic hope envisions a king who embodies perfect obedience to Law — not conquest, but righteousness extended to all nations.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR IV: CHRISTIANITY -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06"><path d="M0,0 C480,55 960,0 1440,40 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar4" class="bg-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar IV · ✝️ Christianity</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">Grace and Stewardship</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"Whoever would be great among you must be your servant." — Mark 10:43</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      In Christ, authority is redeemed through service. Law is fulfilled in love, and leadership becomes stewardship. The cross transforms power into sacrifice; greatness is measured by humility. Through grace, believers are freed from domination — not to rule others, but to serve them. <strong>Every gift, resource, and talent is held in trust for the good of all.</strong>
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      The washing of the disciples' feet is the defining image of Christian leadership: the one with the highest authority performs the lowest act. Grace does not abolish law; it writes it upon the heart. The difference between law as external command and law as inner love is the difference between the servant who obeys from fear and the son who obeys from devotion.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      "Forgive us our debts as we forgive our debtors" — this establishes a direct link between vertical forgiveness (God forgiving humanity) and horizontal forgiveness (humans forgiving each other). <em>An economy could reflect redemption; mercy could reshape the structure of exchange.</em>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      Meekness is not weakness — "the meek shall inherit the earth" describes a posture of strength held in restraint. The indwelling Spirit becomes the true lawgiver — the Kingdom is found not in any external structure but within. Grace does not abolish justice; it perfects it.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR V: HINDUISM -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0f1a0f"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar5" class="bg-mid">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar V · 🕉️ Hinduism</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">Dharma and Liberation</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"Better one's own duty, though imperfect, than another's done well." — Bhagavad Gita 3:35</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      Dharma is the eternal law that upholds both cosmos and conscience. Each being has a <em>Swadharma</em> — a unique duty aligned with their nature and truth. When action follows Dharma without attachment to reward, it becomes Yoga — a path toward <em>Moksha</em> (liberation). <strong>True power lies not in conquest but in self-mastery.</strong>
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      Krishna's command to Arjuna to fight is not a glorification of war but an insistence that cowardly inaction is itself a form of ignorance. The intention behind an act defines its purity. The Bhagavad Gita's deeper teaching is about the inner war: the battle against self-deception, ego, and the attachment that binds the soul.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      The four aims of life — Dharma (righteousness), Artha (material prosperity), Kama (pleasure), and Moksha (liberation) — offer a framework for integrated human flourishing. None is to be abandoned; each must be held in its proper relationship with the others.
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      "Tat Tvam Asi" — "Thou art That." The individual self is not ultimately separate from the divine ground of being. When this is realized, all duty becomes love, and all love becomes liberation.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR VI: BUDDHISM -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0f1a0f"><path d="M0,0 C480,55 960,0 1440,40 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar6" class="bg-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar VI · ☸️ Buddhism</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">Awareness and Compassion</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"Hatred is never ended by hatred; it is ended by love." — Dhammapada 5</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      Buddhism teaches that all suffering arises from ignorance and attachment. The Four Noble Truths do not offer a pessimistic view of existence but a diagnostic one: suffering is real, its cause (attachment arising from ignorance) is identifiable, its cessation is possible, and the path to that cessation is practicable. <strong>Suffering can become a teacher rather than a curse when awareness transforms pain into wisdom.</strong>
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      The Bodhisattva ideal — the being who delays their own complete enlightenment in order to assist all other beings to liberation — transforms compassion from an emotion into a vow. The concept of <em>upaya</em> (skillful means) recognizes that wisdom must find the right form of expression for each situation, that gentleness can accomplish what force cannot.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      The teaching on <em>shunyata</em> (emptiness) is perhaps Buddhism's most radical contribution: clinging to a rigid identity creates suffering because it fights against the fluid reality of existence. Seeing emptiness leads not to nihilism but to <em>freedom</em> — the freedom to act from genuine compassion rather than from an anxious need to protect a separate self.
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      The Middle Way between extreme asceticism and indulgence is not a compromise but a third kind of path — one that discovers clarity precisely by avoiding the distortions that extremes create. The Five Precepts — non-harm, truthfulness, non-stealing, right conduct, and clarity of mind — are universal principles that any tradition can honor.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR VII: TAOISM -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#060b06"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar7">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar VII · ☯️ Taoism</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">Natural Order</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"The more laws and commands, the more thieves and robbers." — Tao Te Ching 57</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      Taoism teaches that the universe flows from the Tao — the nameless Way that governs all things without command. Harmony arises not from control but from alignment with nature's rhythm. <em>Wu Wei</em> — effortless action, action without forcing — is the highest virtue. When rulers multiply laws, they sow rebellion; when sages act in stillness, all things are done.
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      The Tao cannot be fully spoken or written. Yet it is everywhere present: in the grain of wood, in the course of rivers, in the cycles of seasons, in the patterns of growth and return. Law that becomes rigid and absolute loses this quality — it fights the flow of life rather than expressing it.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      The Taoist critique of governance is also a critique of design philosophy: a world built in straight lines and rigid hierarchies produces people who think in domination and control. <em>The spiral — the Fibonacci pattern of natural growth — is the shape of freedom; the cube is the shape of slavery.</em>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      The sage leads by not contending, governs by not ruling, and acts by not forcing. Power hides in gentleness; wisdom dwells in low places. "Return is the movement of the Tao" — every excess carries within it the seed of its own correction. The just society mirrors the balance of heaven and earth: simple, self-ordering, and free.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PILLAR VIII: CONFUCIANISM -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06"><path d="M0,0 C480,55 960,0 1440,40 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/></svg></div>

<section id="pillar8" class="bg-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pillar-header fu">
      <div class="pillar-tag">Pillar VIII · 🏮 Confucianism</div>
      <h2 class="pillar-h2">Virtue and Harmony</h2>
      <p class="pillar-quote">"If the ruler is upright, all will be upright." — Analects 12:17</p>
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2">
      Confucianism teaches that harmony begins in the heart and extends outward — from self to family, family to state, state to world. The <em>Junzi</em> (superior person) cultivates inner virtue and expresses it through outer conduct. <strong>Law without virtue cannot stand; order without love becomes tyranny.</strong>
    </p>
    <p class="prose fu d3">
      <em>Ren</em> (benevolence) is the highest virtue — compassion that begins with family and extends to all. <em>Li</em> (ritual propriety) preserves the forms through which relationships are honored and meaning is transmitted across generations. <em>Yi</em> (righteousness) guides decisions when law is silent: it is better to lose wealth than lose integrity.
    </p>
    <div class="pull-quote fu d4">
      "The virtue of the ruler is the wind; the virtue of the people, the grass." <em>Heaven's Mandate (Tianming) legitimizes rule only so long as the ruler acts virtuously; tyranny causes the Mandate's withdrawal.</em> In the end, moral example outlives all empires.
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d4">
      The ruler leads by moral example — not by command but by being. The cultivation of the self is not merely personal improvement — it is the first act of political reform. A society of cultivated souls needs fewer laws; a society of corrupt ones cannot be saved by any number of regulations.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EPILOGUE -->
<div class="wave"><svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a"><path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/></svg></div>

<section id="epilogue">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="mandala fu">
      <span style="font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold)">Epilogue</span>
      <h2 style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.5rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--warm);margin:.8rem 0 1.2rem">The Circle Without a Crown</h2>

      <p class="prose" style="text-align:center;margin:0 auto">
        Every pillar, examined faithfully, reveals the same light. Authority belongs to truth. Conscience binds humanity more deeply than command. Law is discovered, not invented. The True Republic — a realm of hearts, self-governed by love, united by the law written within — is not a place to be founded but a truth to be remembered.
      </p>

      <div class="mandala-circle">
        <div class="mandala-dot bright"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot bright"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot bright"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot bright"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot"></div>
        <div class="mandala-dot bright"></div>
      </div>

      <p style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.12rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--warm);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:1.4rem">
        "Eight lights circling one center. Remove any pillar and the circle weakens; together they form a living temple."
      </p>
      <p class="prose" style="text-align:center;margin:0 auto;margin-bottom:2.4rem">
        The path of the Sagent is to walk among all these lights, learn from each, and carry their unity into the world — not as a syncretic compromise, but as the recognition that truth has always been singular, even when it speaks in many voices.
      </p>

      <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <a href="true-republic.html" class="btn-p">Read the Manifesto</a>
        <a href="sagent.html" class="btn-s">Meet the Sagent</a>
        <a href="writings.html" class="btn-s">Read the Essays</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-brand">
    <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span>The Spiral Steward</span>
  </div>
  <p class="footer-tag">One truth spoken in eight tongues.</p>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#join">Join</a></li>
  </ul>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 The Spiral Steward · Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</p>
</footer>

<script>
const fuEls = document.querySelectorAll('.fu');
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('on'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });
fuEls.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
index.html HTML ▶ expand 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Spiral Steward — Life-Based Design</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg-deep:    #060b06;
      --bg-dark:    #0a120a;
      --bg-mid:     #0f1a0f;
      --green-dark: #2a5c25;
      --green-mid:  #3d7a35;
      --green-hi:   #5aab4d;
      --green-lt:   #7cc46d;
      --gold:       #c9a227;
      --amber:      #e07b1a;
      --cream:      #f0ebe0;
      --warm:       #faf7f0;
      --muted:      #8a9e86;
      --dim:        #5a6a56;
      --serif:      'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
      --sans:       'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg-deep);
      color: var(--cream);
      font-family: var(--sans);
      font-weight: 300;
      line-height: 1.75;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* ──────────────── NAV ──────────────── */
    #nav {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 1.1rem 3rem;
      background: rgba(6,11,6,0.88);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,0.14);
      transition: border-color .3s;
    }
    .nav-brand {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .65rem;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .nav-brand-name {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--cream); letter-spacing: .02em;
    }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.2rem; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a {
      text-decoration: none; color: var(--muted);
      font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 400;
      letter-spacing: .09em; text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: color .3s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .nav-cta {
      border: 1px solid var(--green-hi) !important;
      color: var(--green-hi) !important;
      padding: .45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 2px;
      transition: background .3s, color .3s !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover {
      background: var(--green-hi) !important;
      color: var(--bg-deep) !important;
    }
    .nav-burger { display: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
    .nav-burger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 2px; }

    /* ──────────────── HERO ──────────────── */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; align-items: center;
      padding: 8rem 3rem 5rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    #hero-bg {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 68% 50%, rgba(42,92,37,.18) 0%, transparent 55%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 28% 70%, rgba(201,162,39,.06) 0%, transparent 45%);
    }
    .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 580px; }
    .eyebrow {
      display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--green-hi); margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    }
    .hero-h1 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4rem);
      font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.08; color: var(--warm);
      margin-bottom: .9rem;
    }
    .hero-sub {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
      font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
    }
    .hero-desc {
      font-size: .98rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85;
      margin-bottom: 2.4rem; max-width: 460px;
    }
    .hero-desc strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: .85rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .btn-p {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-hi));
      color: var(--warm); border: none; padding: .88rem 1.9rem;
      font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 2px; transition: opacity .3s; display: inline-block;
    }
    .btn-p:hover { opacity: .85; }
    .btn-s {
      background: transparent; color: var(--cream);
      border: 1px solid rgba(240,235,224,.28); padding: .88rem 1.9rem;
      font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 400;
      letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 2px; transition: all .3s; display: inline-block;
    }
    .btn-s:hover { border-color: var(--green-hi); color: var(--green-hi); }
    .hero-canvas-wrap {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
    }
    #hero-spiral { width: 100%; max-width: 520px; }
    .scroll-cue {
      position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: .4rem;
      color: var(--dim); font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;
      animation: cue 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .scroll-cue::after {
      content: ''; width: 1px; height: 36px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--green-hi), transparent);
    }
    @keyframes cue {
      0%,100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
      50%      { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(7px); }
    }

    /* ──────────────── WAVE ──────────────── */
    .wave { width: 100%; overflow: hidden; line-height: 0; }
    .wave svg { display: block; width: 100%; }

    /* ──────────────── SECTIONS ──────────────── */
    section { padding: 6rem 3rem; }
    .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .sec-eyebrow {
      display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--green-hi); margin-bottom: .9rem;
    }
    .sec-h2 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.5vw, 2.75rem);
      font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.12; color: var(--warm);
      margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
    }
    .sec-sub {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem;
      font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }
    .prose {
      font-size: .98rem; line-height: 1.88; color: var(--muted); max-width: 680px;
    }
    .prose strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .prose em { color: var(--gold); }

    /* ──────────────── SCROLL ANIMATIONS ──────────────── */
    .fu {
      opacity: 0; transform: translateY(36px);
      transition: opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease;
    }
    .fu.on { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    .d1 { transition-delay: .1s; } .d2 { transition-delay: .2s; }
    .d3 { transition-delay: .3s; } .d4 { transition-delay: .4s; }
    .d5 { transition-delay: .5s; }

    /* ──────────────── THE ERROR ──────────────── */
    #error { background: var(--bg-dark); }
    .error-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; margin-top: 3.5rem; }
    .manifesto {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 2; color: var(--muted);
    }
    .manifesto .hi { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 600; }
    .manifesto .bad { color: var(--amber); }
    .card-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .9rem; margin-top: 1rem; }
    .card-item {
      padding: 1.3rem 1.3rem 1.3rem 1.6rem;
      border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.18); border-radius: 4px;
      background: rgba(15,26,15,.45); position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .card-item::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;
      width: 3px; height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--green-hi), var(--gold));
    }
    .card-item strong { display: block; color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: .2rem; }
    .card-item p { font-size: .88rem; color: var(--muted); }

    /* ──────────────── THE LIE ──────────────── */
    #lie {
      background: var(--bg-deep); text-align: center; padding: 8rem 3rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    #lie::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(201,162,39,.08) 0%, transparent 60%);
    }
    .lie-quote {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 4.5vw, 3.6rem);
      font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--gold);
      line-height: 1.25; max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
      position: relative; z-index: 1;
    }
    .lie-quote::before {
      content: '"'; font-size: 9rem; color: rgba(201,162,39,.12);
      position: absolute; top: -3rem; left: -2rem; line-height: 1;
      font-family: var(--serif);
    }
    .lie-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 1.2rem;
      margin-top: 3rem; text-align: left; position: relative; z-index: 1;
    }

    /* ──────────────── LIVING AGE ──────────────── */
    #living { background: var(--bg-mid); }
    .living-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center; }
    .callout {
      padding: 1.6rem; border-left: 2px solid var(--green-hi);
      background: rgba(6,11,6,.5); margin-top: 1.5rem;
    }
    .callout p {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-style: italic;
      color: var(--cream); font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .callout p + p { margin-top: .5rem; }
    .callout strong { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .pillars { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .9rem; }
    .pillar {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: .9rem;
      padding: 1.1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.14);
      border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(6,11,6,.4);
      transition: border-color .3s, background .3s;
    }
    .pillar:hover { border-color: rgba(90,171,77,.38); background: rgba(15,26,15,.7); }
    .pillar-ico {
      width: 34px; height: 34px; flex-shrink: 0;
      background: rgba(90,171,77,.13); border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      color: var(--green-hi); font-size: 1rem;
    }
    .pillar-body h4 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: .98rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: .2rem; }
    .pillar-body p { font-size: .84rem; color: var(--muted); }

    /* ──────────────── STEWARD ──────────────── */
    #steward { background: #080c08; }
    .steward-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: start; }
    .steward-quote {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem; font-style: italic;
      color: var(--cream); line-height: 1.8;
      padding-left: 1.4rem; border-left: 2px solid var(--green-hi);
      margin: 1.2rem 0;
    }
