    .vs-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; gap: .5rem; align-items: center; padding: .55rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04); }
    .vs-row .old { color: var(--dim); font-size: .88rem; text-decoration: line-through; text-align: right; }
    .vs-row .arr { color: var(--green-hi); font-size: 1rem; }
    .vs-row .nw  { color: var(--green-lt); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 500; }
    .life-lang {
      margin-top: 1.5rem; padding: 1.8rem; border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.2);
      border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(201,162,39,.04); text-align: center;
    }
    .life-lang p:first-child {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.1rem;
      color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; line-height: 1.65;
    }
    .life-lang p:last-child { font-size: .88rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: .6rem; }

    /* ──────────────── SPIRAL vs BLOCK ──────────────── */
    #svb { background: var(--bg-deep); text-align: center; }
    .svb-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3.5rem;
      margin: 3.5rem auto 0; max-width: 860px;
    }
    .svb-card { padding: 2.8rem 2rem; border-radius: 8px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .svb-block { background: rgba(18,18,24,.75); border: 1px solid rgba(100,100,130,.25); }
    .svb-spiral { background: rgba(8,18,8,.75); border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.28); }
    .svb-vis { width: 110px; height: 110px; margin: 0 auto 1.8rem; }
    .cube-scene {
      width: 60px; height: 60px; perspective: 200px; margin: 25px auto 0;
    }
    .cube {
      width: 60px; height: 60px; transform-style: preserve-3d;
      animation: spin-cube 10s infinite linear;
    }
    @keyframes spin-cube { from { transform: rotateX(20deg) rotateY(0); } to { transform: rotateX(20deg) rotateY(360deg); } }
    .cube-face {
      position: absolute; width: 60px; height: 60px;
      background: rgba(50,50,70,.6); border: 1px solid rgba(100,100,140,.4);
    }
    .cube-face.fr { transform: translateZ(30px); }
    .cube-face.bk { transform: rotateY(180deg) translateZ(30px); }
    .cube-face.lt { transform: rotateY(-90deg) translateZ(30px); }
    .cube-face.rt { transform: rotateY(90deg)  translateZ(30px); }
    .cube-face.tp { transform: rotateX(90deg)  translateZ(30px); }
    .cube-face.bt { transform: rotateX(-90deg) translateZ(30px); }
    .svb-title { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.4rem; }
    .svb-block  .svb-title { color: #7878a0; }
    .svb-spiral .svb-title { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .trait-list { list-style: none; text-align: left; }
    .trait-list li { font-size: .9rem; padding: .38rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05); }
    .svb-block  .trait-list li { color: #606080; }
    .svb-block  .trait-list li::before { content: '■ '; color: #404060; }
    .svb-spiral .trait-list li { color: var(--muted); }
    .svb-spiral .trait-list li::before { content: '◈ '; color: var(--green-hi); }
    .svb-verdict {
      margin-top: 3rem;
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.15rem;
      color: var(--cream); line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .svb-verdict span { color: var(--green-hi); }

    /* ──────────────── GREEN FLAME ──────────────── */
    #flame {
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--bg-dark), #0a1a06);
      text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    #flame-canvas { display: block; margin: 2.5rem auto; width: 180px; height: 180px; }
    .cycle {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      gap: 1rem; margin: 1.5rem 0; flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .cycle-step { text-align: center; }
    .cycle-step .lbl { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; }
    .cycle-step .sub { font-size: .72rem; color: var(--dim); letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; }
    .cycle-step:nth-child(1) .lbl { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .cycle-step:nth-child(3) .lbl { color: var(--amber); }
    .cycle-step:nth-child(5) .lbl { color: var(--gold); }
    .cycle-arr { color: var(--dim); font-size: 1.4rem; }
    .trinity {
      display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 3rem;
      margin: 2rem 0; flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .trin-item { text-align: center; }
    .trin-item .word { font-family: var(--serif); font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); }
    .trin-item .concept { font-size: .78rem; color: var(--dim); margin-top: .2rem; }
    .flame-maxim {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.15rem; font-style: italic;
      color: var(--green-hi); margin-top: 2.5rem;
    }

    /* ──────────────── LIVINGWORKS ──────────────── */
    #lw { background: var(--bg-mid); }
    .lw-intro { max-width: 680px; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }
    .lw-tagline { font-family: var(--serif); font-style: italic; color: var(--muted); font-size: 1.05rem; margin: .8rem 0 1.8rem; }
    .cmp-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }
    .cmp-col h4 { font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: .9rem; }
    .cmp-old h4 { color: var(--dim); }
    .cmp-new h4 { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .cmp-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .55rem; }
    .cmp-list li { font-size: .92rem; padding: .68rem .95rem; border-radius: 4px; }
    .cmp-old .cmp-list li { color: var(--dim); background: rgba(25,25,25,.4); text-decoration: line-through; }
    .cmp-new .cmp-list li { color: var(--cream); background: rgba(61,122,53,.14); border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.18); }
    .cmp-new .cmp-list li::before { content: '→ '; color: var(--green-hi); }
    .lw-cq {
      padding: 2.2rem 2.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.2);
      border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(6,11,6,.55); max-width: 660px;
    }
    .lw-cq .pre { font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--dim); margin-bottom: .8rem; }
    .lw-cq .q {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.55rem;
      color: var(--cream); font-style: italic; line-height: 1.4;
    }
    .lw-cq .q span { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .lw-cq .a { margin-top: .9rem; font-size: .88rem; color: var(--muted); }

    /* ──────────────── APPLICATIONS ──────────────── */
    #apps { background: var(--bg-dark); }
    .apps-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 1.4rem; margin-top: 2.8rem; }
    .app-card {
      padding: 1.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.14); border-radius: 6px;
      background: rgba(8,16,8,.55); transition: all .3s; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .app-card::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--green-mid), var(--gold));
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3s;
    }
    .app-card:hover { border-color: rgba(90,171,77,.38); transform: translateY(-3px); }
    .app-card:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
    .app-ico {
      width: 46px; height: 46px; background: rgba(90,171,77,.11);
      border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 1.3rem; margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
    }
    .app-title { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: .6rem; }
    .app-desc { font-size: .86rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.65; }

    /* ──────────────── DISCIPLINES ──────────────── */
    #disc { background: var(--bg-mid); text-align: center; }
    .disc-wrap { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .9rem; justify-content: center; margin-top: 2.8rem; max-width: 820px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
    .disc-tag {
      padding: .55rem 1.1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.22); border-radius: 100px;
      font-size: .83rem; color: var(--muted); background: rgba(8,16,8,.4);
      transition: all .3s; cursor: default;
    }
    .disc-tag:hover { border-color: var(--green-hi); color: var(--green-hi); background: rgba(90,171,77,.08); }
    .disc-tag .arr { color: var(--dim); }

    /* ──────────────── FINAL ──────────────── */
    #final {
      background: var(--bg-deep); text-align: center; padding: 10rem 3rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    #final::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(61,122,53,.16) 0%, transparent 65%);
    }
    .final-q {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 4.5vw, 3.2rem);
      font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.25;
      max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto 1.2rem; position: relative;
    }
    .final-sq {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.2vw, 1.45rem);
      font-style: italic; color: var(--green-hi); position: relative; margin-bottom: 3rem;
    }
    .final-dec {
      font-size: .92rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 2.2;
      position: relative; margin-bottom: 4rem;
    }
    .final-dec span { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .final-symbols { display: flex; gap: 2rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; position: relative; }
    .sym {
      text-align: center; padding: 1.4rem 1.9rem;
      border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.2); border-radius: 4px; min-width: 120px;
    }
    .sym .glyph { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.9rem; }
    .sym .label { font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--dim); margin-top: .4rem; }
    .sym.g .glyph { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .sym.au { border-color: rgba(201,162,39,.2); }
    .sym.au .glyph { color: var(--gold); }

    /* ──────────────── JOIN ──────────────── */
    #join { background: var(--bg-dark); text-align: center; padding: 6rem 3rem; }
    .join-card {
      max-width: 580px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 3.5rem 3rem;
      border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.28); border-radius: 8px;
      background: rgba(8,16,8,.55);
    }
    .join-card h2 {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--warm); margin-bottom: .9rem;
    }
    .join-card p { font-size: .93rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 1.9rem; }
    .join-form { display: flex; gap: .7rem; }
    .join-input {
      flex: 1; padding: .82rem 1.1rem;
      background: rgba(6,11,6,.8); border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.28);
      border-radius: 2px; color: var(--cream); font-family: var(--sans);
      font-size: .88rem; outline: none; transition: border-color .3s;
    }
    .join-input:focus { border-color: var(--green-hi); }
    .join-input::placeholder { color: var(--dim); }
    .join-note { font-size: .75rem; color: var(--dim); margin-top: .9rem; }

    /* ──────────────── FOOTER ──────────────── */
    footer {
      background: var(--bg-deep); border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1);
      padding: 3rem; text-align: center;
    }
    .footer-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .65rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .footer-brand span { font-family: var(--serif); color: var(--cream); }
    .footer-tag { font-size: .83rem; color: var(--dim); font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
    .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; justify-content: center; list-style: none; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .footer-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--dim); font-size: .78rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color .3s; }
    .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .footer-copy { font-size: .73rem; color: var(--dim); }

    /* ──────────────── RESPONSIVE ──────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .lie-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      #nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .nav-burger { display: flex; }
      .nav-links.open {
        display: flex; flex-direction: column;
        position: fixed; top: 56px; left: 0; right: 0;
        background: rgba(6,11,6,.97); padding: 2rem 1.5rem; gap: 1.2rem;
      }
      #hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 7rem 1.5rem 4.5rem; text-align: center; }
      .hero-canvas-wrap { order: -1; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
      #hero-spiral { max-width: 260px; }
      .hero-desc { margin: 0 auto 2rem; }
      .hero-btns { justify-content: center; }
      section { padding: 4.5rem 1.5rem; }
      .error-grid, .living-grid, .steward-grid, .svb-grid, .cmp-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; }
      .lie-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .apps-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .join-card { padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem; }
      .join-form { flex-direction: column; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .apps-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .final-symbols { gap: 1rem; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="#" class="nav-brand">
    <svg width="30" height="30" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span class="nav-brand-name">The Spiral Steward</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#lw">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="book.html">Get the Book</a></li>
    <li><a href="#join" class="nav-cta">Join</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-burger" id="burger" onclick="document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div id="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <span class="eyebrow fu">Life-Based Design</span>
    <h1 class="hero-h1 fu d1">The End of<br>the Engineer</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub fu d2">And the Birth of Life-Based Design</p>
    <p class="hero-desc fu d3">
      The industrial age is ending. A new era of <strong>living systems</strong>,
      <strong>regenerative design</strong>, and <strong>decentralized creation</strong>
      rises from its ashes. We are the Stewards of Life.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns fu d4">
      <a href="#error" class="btn-p">Enter the Living Age</a>
      <a href="#lw"    class="btn-s">Discover LivingWorks</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-canvas-wrap">
    <canvas id="hero-spiral" width="520" height="520"></canvas>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-cue">Scroll</div>
</section>

<!-- WAVE -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06">
    <path d="M0,28 C360,56 1080,0 1440,28 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- THE INDUSTRIAL ERROR -->
<section id="error">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">The Problem</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">The Industrial Error</h2>
    <div class="error-grid">
      <div class="manifesto fu d2">
        <p>The <span class="hi">Engineer</span> is a product of the industrial age—an age defined by <span class="bad">dead engines</span>, rigid blocks, and domination over life.</p>
        <br>
        <p>Industrial engineering designs systems that must first <span class="bad">kill</span> what is living: trees become lumber, soil becomes substrate, ecosystems become resources. Only once life is stripped away can control be imposed.</p>
        <br>
        <p>This worldview is inherited from Rome: <em style="color:var(--amber)">hierarchy over harmony, command over relationship, domination over participation.</em></p>
        <br>
        <p>Nature is treated as chaos to be conquered.<br>Life is treated as a problem to be solved.</p>
        <br>
        <p>And so we built a world of cubes, grids, and monocultures—<br><span class="bad">a world efficient on paper and catastrophic in reality.</span></p>
        <br>
        <p style="color:var(--cream)">This is not a failure of technology.<br>It is a failure of <strong style="color:var(--gold)">design philosophy</strong>.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="fu d3">
        <p class="sec-sub" style="margin-bottom:1.2rem">The result is visible everywhere:</p>
        <ul class="card-list">
          <li class="card-item"><strong>Dead Soil</strong><p>Monoculture agriculture strips life from the land, producing food that cannot sustain future generations.</p></li>
          <li class="card-item"><strong>Collapsing Ecosystems</strong><p>Biodiversity destroyed in the name of efficiency and uniformity, leaving fragile monocultures in its wake.</p></li>
          <li class="card-item"><strong>Brittle Supply Chains</strong><p>Centralized megasystems that fail catastrophically the moment stress appears.</p></li>
          <li class="card-item"><strong>Soulless Cities</strong><p>Dead spaces built from dead matter—housing machines, not living beings. Dead spaces create dead thinking.</p></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- THE LIE -->
<section id="lie">
  <div class="container" style="position:relative;z-index:1">
    <p class="fu" style="font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:1.5rem">The Devastating Lie of the Industrial Age</p>
    <div class="lie-quote fu d1">
      That humans are separate from nature.
    </div>
    <p class="prose fu d2" style="text-align:center;margin:0 auto">
      From this single lie, the industrial age built a civilization designed to destroy itself.
    </p>
    <div class="lie-grid fu d3">
      <div class="card-item">
        <strong>Spiral vs Straight Line</strong>
        <p>Where life grows in spirals, we imposed straight lines and rigid grids.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-item">
        <strong>Diversity vs Uniformity</strong>
        <p>Where ecosystems rely on diversity, we enforced monoculture and sameness.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-item">
        <strong>Emergence vs Control</strong>
        <p>Where systems wanted decentralization, we demanded empire and central command.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-item">
        <strong>Relationship vs Hierarchy</strong>
        <p>Where life builds through connection, we built through domination and extraction.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="fu d4" style="margin-top:2.5rem;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--muted);position:relative;z-index:1">
      The ancient Amazonian civilizations understood: <em style="color:var(--gold)">abundance emerges from biodiversity, stability comes from relationship, growth follows spirals—not grids.</em>
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WAVE -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06">
    <path d="M0,0 C480,55 960,0 1440,40 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0f1a0f"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- THE LIVING AGE -->
<section id="living">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="living-grid">
      <div>
        <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">The Transition</span>
        <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">The Living Age</h2>
        <p class="prose fu d2">
          The industrial age was not meaningless. It was a <strong>necessary death</strong>—a stepping stone, not a destination. We could not have learned how life works without first dissecting it. Now the conditions have changed.
        </p>
        <br>
        <p class="prose fu d3">
          We finally possess the tools—biological data, machine learning, decentralized computation—to move beyond dead manufacturing into <strong>living creation</strong>.
        </p>
        <div class="callout fu d4">
          <p>You do not command life.<br>You <strong>listen</strong> to it.</p>
          <p>You do not force outcomes.<br>You <strong>invite emergence</strong>.</p>
        </div>
        <p class="fu d5" style="margin-top:1.4rem;font-size:.92rem;color:var(--muted)">
          <em style="color:var(--gold)">Anything that is not growing is decaying.</em><br>The Living Age is built on this truth.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="sec-sub fu" style="margin-bottom:1.4rem">This is the age of:</p>
        <ul class="pillars">
          <li class="pillar fu d1">
            <div class="pillar-ico">⟳</div>
            <div class="pillar-body"><h4>Symbiotic Design</h4><p>Systems that thrive through cooperation and mutual benefit, not competition and extraction.</p></div>
          </li>
          <li class="pillar fu d2">
            <div class="pillar-ico">🌱</div>
            <div class="pillar-body"><h4>Regenerative Systems</h4><p>Structures that heal, renew, and return more than they consume—healing as they function.</p></div>
          </li>
          <li class="pillar fu d3">
            <div class="pillar-ico">⬡</div>
            <div class="pillar-body"><h4>Decentralized Biomanufacturing</h4><p>Local, adaptive production rooted in ecological intelligence. No centralized fragility.</p></div>
          </li>
          <li class="pillar fu d4">
            <div class="pillar-ico">∞</div>
            <div class="pillar-body"><h4>Structures That Grow</h4><p>Adaptive, self-repairing forms that grow, adapt, repair, and renew through living processes.</p></div>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WAVE -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0f1a0f">
    <path d="M0,55 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,0 L0,0 Z" fill="#080c08"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- THE STEWARD -->
<section id="steward">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="steward-grid">
      <div>
        <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">A New Role</span>
        <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">The Steward of Life</h2>
        <p class="prose fu d2">We need a new name for the designer of this age. Not <strong>Engineer</strong>—because engines are dead.</p>
        <br>
        <p class="prose fu d3">This new designer does not work <em>on</em> nature. They work <strong>within</strong> it. Like Adam—formed from the soil itself, placed in the garden not to dominate it, but to tend it and keep it in balance.</p>
        <div class="steward-quote fu d4">
          They design like a gardener, not a general.<br>
          Like a conductor, not a dictator.
        </div>
        <p class="fu d5" style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.8rem">This is design in the image of God:</p>
        <p class="fu d5" style="font-family:var(--serif);color:var(--cream)">
          Order through <span style="color:var(--green-hi)">relationship</span>, not hierarchy.<br>
          Creation through <span style="color:var(--green-hi)">harmony</span>, not force.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="fu d2">
        <p style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.5rem">The shift in thinking:</p>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.3rem">
          <div class="vs-row"><span class="old">Dominate nature</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Serve nature</span></div>
          <div class="vs-row"><span class="old">Control outcomes</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Shape conditions</span></div>
          <div class="vs-row"><span class="old">Build objects</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Cultivate systems</span></div>
          <div class="vs-row"><span class="old">Impose form</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Invite emergence</span></div>
          <div class="vs-row"><span class="old">Extract resources</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Regenerate abundance</span></div>
          <div class="vs-row"><span class="old">Central hierarchy</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Distributed relationships</span></div>
          <div class="vs-row"><span class="old">Dead monoculture</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Living biodiversity</span></div>
          <div class="vs-row" style="border:none"><span class="old">Rule over life</span><span class="arr">→</span><span class="nw">Stewardship of life</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="life-lang">
          <p>Life is not a resource.<br><strong style="color:var(--gold)">Life is a language.</strong></p>
          <p>And the Steward of Life is learning to speak it.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SPIRAL vs BLOCK -->
<section id="svb">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow fu" style="display:block">The Eternal Battle</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1" style="text-align:center;max-width:none">The Spiral vs The Block</h2>
    <p class="prose fu d2" style="text-align:center;margin:0 auto">There is an eternal battle between the shapes of life and the shapes of control.</p>
    <div class="svb-grid">
      <div class="svb-card svb-block fu d2">
        <div class="svb-vis">
          <div class="cube-scene">
            <div class="cube">
              <div class="cube-face fr"></div>
              <div class="cube-face bk"></div>
              <div class="cube-face lt"></div>
              <div class="cube-face rt"></div>
              <div class="cube-face tp"></div>
              <div class="cube-face bt"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <h3 class="svb-title">The Block</h3>
        <ul class="trait-list">
          <li>Central control</li>
          <li>Rigidity &amp; uniformity</li>
          <li>Hierarchy</li>
          <li>Monoculture</li>
          <li>Extraction</li>
          <li>Brittleness</li>
          <li>Empire</li>
          <li>Obedience over wisdom</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="svb-card svb-spiral fu d3">
        <div class="svb-vis">
          <canvas id="mini-spiral" width="110" height="110"></canvas>
        </div>
        <h3 class="svb-title">The Spiral</h3>
        <ul class="trait-list">
          <li>Decentralization</li>
          <li>Adaptability &amp; growth</li>
          <li>Relationship</li>
          <li>Biodiversity</li>
          <li>Regeneration</li>
          <li>Resilience</li>
          <li>Freedom</li>
          <li>Living wisdom</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="svb-verdict fu d4">
      The cube is the shape of slavery.<br>
      <span>The Fibonacci spiral is the shape of freedom.</span>
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- THE GREEN FLAME -->
<section id="flame">
  <div class="container" style="position:relative;z-index:1">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow fu" style="display:block;text-align:center">The Transformation</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1" style="text-align:center;max-width:none">The Green Flame</h2>
    <p class="prose fu d2" style="text-align:center;margin:0 auto">
      The industrial age will not fade quietly. It must burn.<br>
      But this is not a destructive fire.
    </p>
    <canvas id="flame-canvas" width="180" height="180"></canvas>
    <div class="cycle fu d3">
      <div class="cycle-step"><div class="lbl">Life</div><div class="sub">Creation</div></div>
      <div class="cycle-arr">→</div>
      <div class="cycle-step"><div class="lbl">Death</div><div class="sub">Sacrifice</div></div>
      <div class="cycle-arr">→</div>
      <div class="cycle-step"><div class="lbl">Rebirth</div><div class="sub">Resurrection</div></div>
    </div>
    <p class="fu d3" style="text-align:center;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:1rem">The backward Fibonacci spiral—written into creation itself:</p>
    <div class="trinity fu d4">
      <div class="trin-item"><div class="word">Father</div><div class="concept">Creation</div></div>
      <div class="trin-item"><div class="word">Son</div><div class="concept">Sacrifice</div></div>
      <div class="trin-item"><div class="word">Holy Spirit</div><div class="concept">Resurrection</div></div>
    </div>
    <p class="flame-maxim fu d5">
      The green flame does not kill life.<br>
      It kills what is already dead.
    </p>
    <p class="fu d5" style="text-align:center;margin-top:1rem;color:var(--muted)">
      From the ashes of the industrial age, the Living Age rises.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WAVE -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a1a06">
    <path d="M0,30 C480,0 960,55 1440,15 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0f1a0f"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- LIVINGWORKS -->
<section id="lw">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="lw-intro">
      <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">The Platform</span>
      <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">LivingWorks</h2>
      <p class="sec-sub fu d2">Designing Life the Way Life Designs Itself</p>
      <p class="lw-tagline fu d3">
        LivingWorks is a life-based design system—the equivalent of SolidWorks or CAD,
        but for <em>living systems</em> instead of dead objects.
      </p>
      <p class="prose fu d4">
        Instead of designing objects, you design <strong>conditions</strong>, <strong>relationships</strong>,
        <strong>flows</strong>, and <strong>ecological roles</strong>.
        You don't draw a house—you design an ecosystem that grows shelter.
        You don't manufacture materials—you cultivate living structures.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="cmp-grid fu d2">
      <div class="cmp-old">
        <h4>Industrial CAD</h4>
        <ul class="cmp-list">
          <li>Design dead objects with fixed shapes</li>
          <li>Specify rigid dimensions</li>
          <li>Impose form on inert material</li>
          <li>Manufacture products in factories</li>
          <li>Centralized, fragile production</li>
          <li>Draw a house</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="cmp-new">
        <h4>LivingWorks</h4>
        <ul class="cmp-list">
          <li>Design conditions &amp; relationships</li>
          <li>Specify energy flows &amp; constraints</li>
          <li>Shape environments for emergence</li>
          <li>Cultivate living processes locally</li>
          <li>Decentralized, adaptive growth</li>
          <li>Design an ecosystem that grows shelter</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lw-cq fu d3">
      <div class="pre">The Core Question of LivingWorks</div>
      <div class="q">"If these conditions exist,<br>what <span>wants</span> to grow here?"</div>
      <div class="a">That is LivingWorks. The system simulates emergence—not assembly. Design becomes discovery.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- APPLICATIONS -->
<section id="apps">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">What We Build</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">Applications</h2>
    <p class="prose fu d2">We do not sell dead products. We cultivate living processes.</p>
    <div class="apps-grid">
      <div class="app-card fu d1">
        <div class="app-ico">🏛</div>
        <h3 class="app-title">Living Architecture</h3>
        <p class="app-desc">Regenerative housing and structures that grow with their environment, self-repair, and heal the ecosystems they inhabit—not dead boxes from dead matter.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="app-card fu d2">
        <div class="app-ico">⬡</div>
        <h3 class="app-title">Decentralized Biomanufacturing</h3>
        <p class="app-desc">Production through biological processes—local, adaptive, resilient. No centralized factories. No monoculture supply chains. No fragile megasystems.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="app-card fu d3">
        <div class="app-ico">🧬</div>
        <h3 class="app-title">Bio-Inspired Materials</h3>
        <p class="app-desc">Materials that self-repair, adapt to structural stress, and integrate with living systems. DNA is not a blueprint—it is a grammar. We learn to speak it.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="app-card fu d1">
        <div class="app-ico">🌾</div>
        <h3 class="app-title">Regenerative Agriculture</h3>
        <p class="app-desc">Agricultural systems designed to regenerate soil, restore biodiversity, and produce abundance without destruction—converting dead monoculture back into life.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="app-card fu d2">
        <div class="app-ico">🔄</div>
        <h3 class="app-title">Evolving Design Frameworks</h3>
        <p class="app-desc">Design platforms that learn, adapt, and evolve over time—living tools for living creation that improve through relationship, not through command.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="app-card fu d3">
        <div class="app-ico">🌐</div>
        <h3 class="app-title">Ecosystem Research</h3>
        <p class="app-desc">Multidisciplinary research into nature's code—contextual, relational, feedback-driven—to unlock the language of life and collaborate with it.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DISCIPLINES -->
<section id="disc">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow fu" style="display:block">Why Multidisciplinary</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">No Single Field Can Understand Life Alone</h2>
    <p class="prose fu d2" style="text-align:center;margin:0 auto">
      To decode nature's language, we need many translators working together.
      Every field is a <strong>cell</strong>, not a ruler. This is not empire research.
      This is <strong>ecosystem research</strong>.
    </p>
    <div class="disc-wrap fu d3">
      <span class="disc-tag">Architecture <span class="arr">→ spatial harmony</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Civil Engineering <span class="arr">→ flows &amp; resilience</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Economics <span class="arr">→ emergence &amp; incentives</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Bioinformatics <span class="arr">→ biological grammar</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Computer Science <span class="arr">→ simulation</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">AI &amp; Machine Learning <span class="arr">→ pattern discovery</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Linguistics <span class="arr">→ grammar &amp; meaning</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Philosophy <span class="arr">→ ethics &amp; purpose</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Political Science <span class="arr">→ decentralization</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Daoism <span class="arr">→ non-forcing, alignment</span></span>
      <span class="disc-tag">Myth &amp; Media <span class="arr">→ cultural transmission</span></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WAVE -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0f1a0f">
    <path d="M0,40 C480,0 960,55 1440,20 L1440,0 L0,0 Z" fill="#060b06"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- FINAL PRINCIPLE -->
<section id="final">
  <div class="container" style="position:relative;z-index:1">
    <p class="final-q fu">Life already knows how to build worlds.</p>
    <p class="final-sq fu d1">We forgot how to listen.</p>
    <div class="final-dec fu d2">
      <p>Not to rule. Not to dominate.</p>
      <p>But to restore balance—</p>
      <p><span>so the thorns return to guarding the garden instead of trying to be king.</span></p>
    </div>
    <div class="final-symbols fu d3">
      <div class="sym g"><div class="glyph">∞</div><div class="label">Growth</div></div>
      <div class="sym au"><div class="glyph">φ</div><div class="label">Harmony</div></div>
      <div class="sym g"><div class="glyph">⟳</div><div class="label">Renewal</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- JOIN -->
<section id="join">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="join-card fu">
      <h2>Join the Living Age</h2>
      <p>
        We are building a movement of Stewards—designers, researchers, builders,
        and thinkers who understand that life is a language, not a resource.
        Be part of the transition from dead manufacturing to living creation.
      </p>
      <div class="join-form">
        <input type="email" class="join-input" placeholder="your@email.com">
        <button class="btn-p">Join the Movement</button>
      </div>
      <p class="join-note">No spam. Only signals worth listening to.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-brand">
    <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span>The Spiral Steward</span>
  </div>
  <p class="footer-tag">Not above nature, but within it.</p>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="#error">The Problem</a></li>
    <li><a href="#lw">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="#join">Join</a></li>
  </ul>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 The Spiral Steward · Life-Based Design · LivingWorks · Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</p>
</footer>

<script>
/* ============================================================
   GOLDEN SPIRAL DRAWING UTILITY
   ============================================================ */
function drawGoldenSpiral(ctx, W, H, prog, opts = {}) {
  const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2;
  const phi = 1.6180339887;
  const b   = Math.log(phi) / (Math.PI / 2);
  const turns = opts.turns || 4.5;
  const a0    = opts.startR || 2;
  const steps = opts.steps  || 1800;
  const totalAngle = turns * 2 * Math.PI;

  /* Glow background */
  const gGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, Math.min(W,H)*0.46);
  gGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(61,122,53,${opts.glowBase || 0.07})`);
  gGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(61,122,53,0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  /* Spiral line */
  const lGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(cx - W*0.4, cy, cx + W*0.4, cy);
  lGrad.addColorStop(0, opts.colorA || '#c9a227');
  lGrad.addColorStop(0.5, opts.colorB || '#5aab4d');
  lGrad.addColorStop(1, opts.colorC || '#2a5c25');

  ctx.lineWidth   = opts.lw || 2.2;
  ctx.strokeStyle = lGrad;
  ctx.shadowColor = opts.shadow || '#5aab4d';
  ctx.shadowBlur  = opts.blur   || 8;
  ctx.lineCap     = 'round';

  ctx.beginPath();
  let first = true;
  const total = Math.floor(steps * Math.min(prog, 1));
  for (let i = 0; i <= total; i++) {
    const t = (i / steps) * totalAngle;
    const r = a0 * Math.exp(b * t);
    const x = cx + r * Math.cos(t + Math.PI);
    const y = cy + r * Math.sin(t + Math.PI);
    first ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    first = false;
  }
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
}

/* ============================================================
   HERO SPIRAL
   ============================================================ */
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('hero-spiral');
  const ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
  let prog = 0, pulsePh = 0, done = false;

  function frame() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    if (!done) {
      prog += 0.007;
      if (prog >= 1) { prog = 1; done = true; }
    } else {
      pulsePh += 0.018;
    }
    const glowBase = done ? 0.06 + 0.025 * Math.sin(pulsePh) : 0.07;
    drawGoldenSpiral(ctx, W, H, prog, {
      turns: 4.5, startR: 2, steps: 1800, lw: 2.5,
      glowBase, blur: done ? 10 + 3*Math.sin(pulsePh) : 8
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }
  setTimeout(frame, 200);
})();

/* ============================================================
   MINI SPIRAL (Spiral vs Block section)
   ============================================================ */
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('mini-spiral');
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
  let prog = 0, started = false;

  function frame() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    prog = Math.min(prog + 0.018, 1);
    drawGoldenSpiral(ctx, W, H, prog, {
      turns: 3.5, startR: 1.5, steps: 800, lw: 1.8,
      glowBase: 0.1, blur: 5,
      colorA:'#c9a227', colorB:'#5aab4d', colorC:'#2a5c25'
    });
    if (prog < 1) requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }

  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    if (entries[0].isIntersecting && !started) {
      started = true; frame();
    }
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  obs.observe(canvas);
})();

/* ============================================================
   GREEN FLAME CANVAS
   ============================================================ */
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('flame-canvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
  const particles = [];
  let running = false;

  class Particle {
    constructor() { this.reset(true); }
    reset(init) {
      this.x    = W/2 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 38;
      this.y    = H - 18 - (init ? Math.random() * H : 0);
      this.vx   = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.2;
      this.vy   = -(0.9 + Math.random() * 2.8);
      this.life = init ? Math.random() : 1;
      this.dec  = 0.012 + Math.random() * 0.014;
      this.r    = 5 + Math.random() * 7;
      this.hue  = 100 + Math.random() * 55;
    }
    update(t) {
      this.x   += this.vx + Math.sin(t * 0.002 + this.y * 0.06) * 0.4;
      this.y   += this.vy;
      this.vy  -= 0.04;
      this.life -= this.dec;
      this.r   *= 0.993;
    }
    draw() {
      const g = ctx.createRadialGradient(this.x, this.y, 0, this.x, this.y, this.r);
      g.addColorStop(0,   `hsla(${this.hue}, 80%, 62%, ${this.life * 0.75})`);
      g.addColorStop(0.5, `hsla(${this.hue-18}, 70%, 38%, ${this.life * 0.35})`);
      g.addColorStop(1,   `hsla(${this.hue+18}, 60%, 28%, 0)`);
      ctx.fillStyle = g;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.r, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
    }
  }
  for (let i = 0; i < 65; i++) particles.push(new Particle());

  function frame(t) {
    if (!running) return;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    const base = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H, 0, W/2, H, 55);
    base.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(90,171,77,0.28)'); base.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(90,171,77,0)');
    ctx.fillStyle = base; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    particles.forEach(p => { p.update(t); p.draw(); if (p.life <= 0) p.reset(false); });
    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }

  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    if (entries[0].isIntersecting && !running) { running = true; requestAnimationFrame(frame); }
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  obs.observe(canvas);
})();

/* ============================================================
   SCROLL ANIMATIONS
   ============================================================ */
const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('on'); });
}, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.fu').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

/* Trigger hero immediately */
document.querySelectorAll('#hero .fu').forEach((el, i) => {
  setTimeout(() => el.classList.add('on'), 150 + i * 130);
});

/* NAV scroll tint */
const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  nav.style.borderBottomColor = window.scrollY > 60
    ? 'rgba(90,171,77,0.28)' : 'rgba(90,171,77,0.14)';
}, { passive: true });
</script>

</body>
</html>
sagent.html HTML ▶ expand 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Sagent — Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg-deep:    #060b06;
      --bg-dark:    #0a120a;
      --bg-mid:     #0f1a0f;
      --green-dark: #2a5c25;
      --green-mid:  #3d7a35;
      --green-hi:   #5aab4d;
      --green-lt:   #7cc46d;
      --gold:       #c9a227;
      --amber:      #e07b1a;
      --cream:      #f0ebe0;
      --warm:       #faf7f0;
      --muted:      #8a9e86;
      --dim:        #5a6a56;
      --serif:      'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
      --sans:       'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg-deep);
      color: var(--cream);
      font-family: var(--sans);
      font-weight: 300;
      line-height: 1.75;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* NAV */
    #nav {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 1.1rem 3rem;
      background: rgba(6,11,6,0.88);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,0.14);
    }
    .nav-brand {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .65rem;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .nav-brand-name {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--cream); letter-spacing: .02em;
    }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a {
      text-decoration: none; color: var(--muted);
      font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 400;
      letter-spacing: .09em; text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: color .3s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .nav-cta {
      border: 1px solid var(--green-hi) !important;
      color: var(--green-hi) !important;
      padding: .45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 2px;
      transition: background .3s, color .3s !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover {
      background: var(--green-hi) !important;
      color: var(--bg-deep) !important;
    }
    .nav-burger { display: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
    .nav-burger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 2px; }

    /* HERO */
    #hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; align-items: center;
      padding: 8rem 3rem 5rem;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    #hero-bg {
      position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 68% 50%, rgba(201,162,39,.12) 0%, transparent 55%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 28% 70%, rgba(42,92,37,.12) 0%, transparent 45%);
    }
    .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 580px; }
    .eyebrow {
      display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    }
    .hero-h1 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4rem);
      font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.08; color: var(--warm);
      margin-bottom: .9rem;
    }
    .hero-sub {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
      font-style: italic; color: var(--green-hi); margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
    }
    .hero-desc {
      font-size: .98rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85;
      margin-bottom: 2.4rem; max-width: 460px;
    }
    .hero-desc strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: .85rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .btn-p {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dark), var(--green-hi));
      color: var(--warm); border: none; padding: .88rem 1.9rem;
      font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 2px; transition: opacity .3s; display: inline-block;
    }
    .btn-p:hover { opacity: .85; }
    .btn-s {
      background: transparent; color: var(--cream);
      border: 1px solid rgba(240,235,224,.28); padding: .88rem 1.9rem;
      font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 400;
      letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
      border-radius: 2px; transition: all .3s; display: inline-block;
    }
    .btn-s:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
    .hero-canvas-wrap {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
    }
    #hero-spiral { width: 100%; max-width: 520px; }

    /* SECTIONS */
    section {
      padding: 6rem 3rem;
      position: relative;
    }
    .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

    .sec-eyebrow {
      display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }
    .sec-h2 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.5vw, 2.9rem);
      font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm);
      line-height: 1.12; margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
    }
    .sec-sub {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 1.08rem; font-style: italic;
      color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
    }
    .prose {
      font-size: .97rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.9; max-width: 700px;
    }
    .prose + .prose { margin-top: 1.2rem; }
    .prose strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .prose em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; }

    /* CREED BLOCK */
    #who { background: var(--bg-dark); }
    .who-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem;
      align-items: start;
    }
    .creed-box {
      background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(201,162,39,.06), rgba(42,92,37,.08));
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.22);
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 2.8rem 2.4rem;
      margin-top: 2rem;
    }
    .creed-line {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 1.18rem; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--gold); line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .creed-line + .creed-line { margin-top: .4rem; }
    .creed-caption {
      margin-top: 1.4rem;
      font-size: .83rem; color: var(--dim);
      font-style: italic; letter-spacing: .04em;
    }

    /* ATTRIBUTE CARDS */
    .attr-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.4rem;
      margin-top: 2.8rem;
    }
    .attr-card {
      background: rgba(15,26,15,.8);
      border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.14);
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 1.6rem 1.4rem;
      transition: border-color .3s;
    }
    .attr-card:hover { border-color: rgba(90,171,77,.35); }
    .attr-icon {
      font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: .8rem;
    }
    .attr-card h3 {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.08rem;
      color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: .5rem;
    }
    .attr-card p { font-size: .86rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.7; }

    /* PATH SECTION */
    #path { background: var(--bg-mid); }
    .path-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem;
      align-items: start;
    }
    .path-quote {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.75rem);
      font-style: italic; color: var(--warm);
      line-height: 1.45; position: relative;
      padding-left: 1.8rem;
    }
    .path-quote::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; left: 0; top: .25em;
      width: 3px; height: 85%; background: var(--gold); border-radius: 2px;
    }

    .pillar-list { list-style: none; margin-top: 1.8rem; }
    .pillar-item {
      display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;
      padding: 1rem 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1);
    }
    .pillar-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .pillar-num {
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600;
      color: rgba(201,162,39,.4); min-width: 2rem; margin-top: -.1rem;
    }
    .pillar-item strong { color: var(--cream); font-size: .94rem; display: block; margin-bottom: .3rem; }
    .pillar-item p { font-size: .84rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.6; }

    /* ANTS SECTION */
    #conflict { background: var(--bg-deep); }
    .conflict-inner {
      max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center;
    }
    .big-quote {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2.1rem);
      font-style: italic; color: var(--warm);
      line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 2rem;
    }
    .big-quote em { color: var(--gold); font-style: normal; }

    .story-grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.4rem;
      margin: 3rem 0; text-align: left;
    }
    .story-card {
      background: rgba(10,18,10,.9);
      border: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.12);
      border-radius: 3px; padding: 1.5rem;
    }
    .story-card .tag {
      font-size: .7rem; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--green-hi); margin-bottom: .7rem;
    }
    .story-card h3 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1rem; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: .5rem; }
    .story-card p { font-size: .83rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.65; }

    /* LIVING CONNECTION */
    #living-link {
      background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(42,92,37,.1), rgba(201,162,39,.06));
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.1);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.1);
    }
    .living-inner { max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .callout {
      background: rgba(6,11,6,.7);
      border-left: 3px solid var(--green-hi);
      padding: 1.6rem 1.8rem;
      margin: 2rem 0;
      font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.02rem;
      color: var(--cream); line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .callout strong { color: var(--gold); }

    /* FOOTER */
    footer {
      background: var(--bg-deep); border-top: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,.1);
      padding: 3rem; text-align: center;
    }
    .footer-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .65rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .footer-brand span { font-family: var(--serif); color: var(--cream); }
    .footer-tag { font-size: .83rem; color: var(--dim); font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
    .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; justify-content: center; list-style: none; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .footer-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--dim); font-size: .78rem; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color .3s; }
    .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .footer-copy { font-size: .73rem; color: var(--dim); }

    /* FADE-UP */
    .fu { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); transition: opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease; }
    .fu.on { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    .d1 { transition-delay: .1s; } .d2 { transition-delay: .2s; }
    .d3 { transition-delay: .3s; } .d4 { transition-delay: .4s; }
    .d5 { transition-delay: .5s; }

    /* WAVE */
    .wave { line-height: 0; }

    /* RESPONSIVE */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .who-grid, .path-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; }
      .attr-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .story-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      #nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .nav-burger { display: flex; }
      .nav-links.open {
        display: flex; flex-direction: column;
        position: fixed; top: 56px; left: 0; right: 0;
        background: rgba(6,11,6,.97); padding: 2rem 1.5rem; gap: 1.2rem;
      }
      #hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 7rem 1.5rem 4.5rem; text-align: center; }
      .hero-canvas-wrap { order: -1; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
      #hero-spiral { max-width: 260px; }
      .hero-desc { margin: 0 auto 2rem; }
      .hero-btns { justify-content: center; }
      section { padding: 4.5rem 1.5rem; }
      .attr-grid, .story-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-brand">
    <svg width="30" height="30" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span class="nav-brand-name">The Spiral Steward</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html" class="active">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="book.html">Get the Book</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#join" class="nav-cta">Join</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-burger" id="burger" onclick="document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div id="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <span class="eyebrow fu">Sage Agent · Divine Wisdom</span>
    <h1 class="hero-h1 fu d1">The Sagent</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub fu d2">When every heart becomes a throne,<br>no crown is needed.</p>
    <p class="hero-desc fu d3">
      <strong>Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</strong> — philosopher, storyteller, and seeker — walks a path between faiths and philosophies, gathering the light of many lamps into one flame.
      A Sagent is not an agent of worldly rulers. He is an agent of <strong>divine wisdom</strong>.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns fu d4">
      <a href="#who" class="btn-p">The Creed</a>
      <a href="#path" class="btn-s">The Path</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-canvas-wrap">
    <canvas id="hero-spiral" width="520" height="520"></canvas>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHO IS THE SAGENT -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06">
    <path d="M0,20 C480,55 960,0 1440,35 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section id="who">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="who-grid">
      <div>
        <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">Identity</span>
        <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">Who Is the Sagent?</h2>
        <p class="prose fu d2">
          To be a Sagent is to reject service to human hierarchies and to become instead an instrument of <strong>the unchanging law written on every human heart</strong>. The Sagent does not force — he plants seeds. He does not rule — he leads by example. He does not serve empire — he serves truth.
        </p>
        <p class="prose fu d3" style="margin-top:1.2rem">
          Heir to a lineage of dreamsmiths and truth-tellers, the Sagent walks the path between faiths and philosophies, finding in each tradition <em>the same light refracted through a different prism</em>. His mission is to restore the Republic of the Heart — a world without rulers, where wisdom governs through love and every soul stands sovereign before Heaven.
        </p>
        <p class="prose fu d4" style="margin-top:1.2rem">
          Truth is not owned but revealed. Not ruled but lived.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="creed-box fu d2">
          <div class="creed-line">Truth is Law.</div>
          <div class="creed-line">Conscience is Crown.</div>
          <div class="creed-line">Every Soul is Sovereign.</div>
          <div style="margin-top:1.4rem;padding-top:1.4rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.2)">
            <p style="font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.02rem;font-style:italic;color:var(--warm);line-height:1.6">
              "When every heart becomes a throne,<br>no crown is needed."
            </p>
          </div>
          <p class="creed-caption">— The Sagent Creed</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attr-grid">
      <div class="attr-card fu d1">
        <div class="attr-icon">🌱</div>
        <h3>Plants Seeds</h3>
        <p>Does not force transformation. Offers truth as a seed and trusts that living soil will grow it into what it must become.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="attr-card fu d2">
        <div class="attr-icon">🔥</div>
        <h3>Leads by Example</h3>
        <p>Authority flows not from position but from integrity. The Sagent governs no one — and therefore all who witness him are drawn to govern themselves.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="attr-card fu d3">
        <div class="attr-icon">⚖️</div>
        <h3>Serves Truth</h3>
        <p>Not empire, not ideology, not reputation. The Sagent's allegiance is to the unchanging moral law written on the human heart before any constitution was penned.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="attr-card fu d1">
        <div class="attr-icon">🕊️</div>
        <h3>Walks Between Traditions</h3>
        <p>From Islam to Taoism, from natural law to living systems — the Sagent finds the common flame beneath the different lamps of human wisdom.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="attr-card fu d2">
        <div class="attr-icon">🌀</div>
        <h3>Thinks in Spirals</h3>
        <p>Not in straight lines or rigid blocks. The spiral is the shape of growth, of memory, of life — and the Sagent designs thought the same way life builds worlds.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="attr-card fu d3">
        <div class="attr-icon">👑</div>
        <h3>Sovereign Soul</h3>
        <p>Every person, fully awakened to conscience, is a sovereign. The Sagent's ultimate teaching is not a creed to follow, but a throne to reclaim — within yourself.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PATH OF THE SAGENT -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0a120a">
    <path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0f1a0f"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section id="path">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">The Way</span>
    <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">The Path of the Sagent</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub fu d2">True Strength, Compassion, and the Illusion of Conflict</p>

    <div class="path-grid">
      <div>
        <p class="prose fu d2">
          In a world where conflict and power struggles often dominate, there lies an enduring truth: <strong>true strength is not derived from external symbols, worldly possessions, or even physical dominance</strong>, but from an internal, divine connection that transcends the material world.
        </p>
        <p class="prose fu d3" style="margin-top:1.2rem">
          This wisdom, conveyed through myth, philosophy, and spirituality, invites us to look beyond the superficial aspects of power and recognize the deeper, often hidden forces that shape our lives. The worldly symbols we associate with power — wealth, fame, political influence — are only <em>tools to help navigate the world, not the source of true strength</em>.
        </p>
        <p class="prose fu d4" style="margin-top:1.2rem">
          The path of the Sagent is a journey of spiritual growth and transformation. It requires not only wisdom but a deep surrender to a higher calling. It is about understanding that the cycles of rise and fall, of storm and growth, are inherent to life's journey — and that we must endure them with wisdom and compassion, never losing sight of the truth that power comes from within and beyond.
        </p>

        <ul class="pillar-list fu d5" style="margin-top:2rem">
          <li class="pillar-item">
            <span class="pillar-num">I</span>
            <div>
              <strong>Inner Source</strong>
              <p>True power arises not from external achievement but from alignment with something greater — purpose, divine connection, the wellbeing of others.</p>
            </div>
          </li>
          <li class="pillar-item">
            <span class="pillar-num">II</span>
            <div>
              <strong>Compassion as Strength</strong>
              <p>It requires strength to forgive, to love, to seek understanding rather than retaliation. Compassion is not weakness — it is the antidote to cycles of violence.</p>
            </div>
          </li>
          <li class="pillar-item">
            <span class="pillar-num">III</span>
            <div>
              <strong>Transcend the Conflict</strong>
              <p>The greatest tool of darkness is the light fighting it on darkness's terms. Victory comes from stepping outside the conflict — not engaging it with the same weapons.</p>
            </div>
          </li>
          <li class="pillar-item">
            <span class="pillar-num">IV</span>
            <div>
              <strong>Service to the Higher</strong>
              <p>A Sagent does not serve human masters or human hierarchies. He serves a calling that transcends the material — and in that service, becomes free.</p>
            </div>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div>
        <p class="path-quote fu d2">
          "The hammer was to control your power; it was never your source of strength."
        </p>
        <p style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--dim);margin-top:.8rem;margin-left:1.8rem;margin-bottom:2.4rem" class="fu d3">— Odin to Thor</p>

        <p class="path-quote fu d4">
          "Compassion is a sign of strength. The lack of compassion is not a display of power, but of fear."
        </p>
        <p style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--dim);margin-top:.8rem;margin-left:1.8rem" class="fu d5">— The Sagent Path</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- THE ILLUSION OF CONFLICT -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#0f1a0f">
    <path d="M0,0 C480,55 960,0 1440,40 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#060b06"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section id="conflict">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="conflict-inner">
      <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">Core Teaching</span>
      <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1" style="text-align:center">The Illusion of Conflict</h2>
      <p class="big-quote fu d2">
        "Consider the red and black ants in a jar. Shaken by an unseen force, they fight each other — not knowing the <em>true enemy is the one who shook the jar</em>."
      </p>
      <p class="prose fu d3" style="margin:0 auto;text-align:center">
        This is how conflict and division are manufactured — by those who control circumstances, obscuring the true nature of the battle. The way to "unshake the jar" is not by engaging in conflict with one another, but by recognizing that external forces often shape our perceptions of good and evil, right and wrong.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="story-grid fu d4">
      <div class="story-card">
        <div class="tag">From Myth</div>
        <h3>Thor's Transformation</h3>
        <p>Asgard is revealed to be a people, not a place. True power is not an external construct — it is an internal calling, a connection to something beyond what the eye can see.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="story-card">
        <div class="tag">From Philosophy</div>
        <h3>Luke's Final Act</h3>
        <p>The power of sacrifice and selflessness — the willingness to put aside personal conflict for the greater good — holds the key to overcoming even the most insurmountable forces.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="story-card">
        <div class="tag">From Spirit</div>
        <h3>Zuko's Redemption</h3>
        <p>True strength emerges not through dominance but through humility and growth. The most powerful transformation is internal, not political. Compassion and honor, not conquest.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="conflict-inner" style="margin-top:3rem">
      <p class="prose fu d4" style="margin:0 auto;text-align:center">
        Evil cannot be defeated by fighting it with the same tools that created it. It must be confronted with <em>the light of understanding</em>, with the courage to rise above and see from a higher perspective. The Sagent does not engage darkness on its terms — he illuminates.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SAGENT AND LIVING ORDER -->
<div class="wave">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 55" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="background:#060b06">
    <path d="M0,35 C360,0 1080,55 1440,20 L1440,55 L0,55 Z" fill="#0a120a"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<section id="living-link">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="living-inner">
      <span class="sec-eyebrow fu">The Connection</span>
      <h2 class="sec-h2 fu d1">Sagent and the Living Order</h2>
      <p class="prose fu d2">
        The Sagent philosophy is not separate from the work of <strong>The Spiral Steward</strong> — it is its soul. LivingWorks is built on the same insight: life cannot be ruled from above, only stewarded from within. Biological systems and social systems obey the same truth.
      </p>

      <div class="callout fu d3">
        <p>
          Just as a living ecosystem cannot be engineered as a finished product, a free society cannot be decreed as a master plan. Both are too complex, too distributed, too <strong>alive</strong>. The appropriate posture in both domains is the same: build structures that support decentralized intelligence, preserve feedback, protect diversity, and allow self-organization to do what it does best.
        </p>
      </div>

      <p class="prose fu d4">
        The Sagent sees this pattern everywhere: in the spiral of a galaxy, in the branching of a river delta, in the emergence of free markets, in the conscience of a single awakened soul. The block enforces uniformity. <em>The spiral cultivates life.</em>
      </p>

      <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:2.8rem" class="fu d5">
        <a href="true-republic.html" class="btn-p">Read the Manifesto</a>
        <a href="eight-pillars.html" class="btn-s">The Eight Pillars</a>
        <a href="index.html" class="btn-s">LivingWorks Platform</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-brand">
    <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none">
      <path d="M15 15 C15 15,17.5 12.5,18.5 10 C20 6.5,17.5 3.5,14 3.5 C9.5 3.5,6 8,6 14 C6 20.5,11.5 26.5,18.5 26.5 C25.5 26.5,29 21,29 14.5 C29 7,23 1.5,15 1.5"
        stroke="#5aab4d" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </svg>
    <span>The Spiral Steward</span>
  </div>
  <p class="footer-tag">Truth is Law. Conscience is Crown. Every Soul is Sovereign.</p>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">LivingWorks</a></li>
    <li><a href="sagent.html">The Sagent</a></li>
    <li><a href="true-republic.html">True Republic</a></li>
    <li><a href="eight-pillars.html">Eight Pillars</a></li>
    <li><a href="writings.html">Writings</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#join">Join</a></li>
  </ul>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 The Spiral Steward · Sage Arthur Jordan Clokey</p>
</footer>

<script>
/* GOLDEN SPIRAL DRAWING UTILITY */
function drawGoldenSpiral(ctx, W, H, prog, opts = {}) {
  const cx = W / 2, cy = H / 2;
  const phi = 1.6180339887;
  const b   = Math.log(phi) / (Math.PI / 2);
  const turns = opts.turns || 4.5;
  const a0    = opts.startR || 2;
  const steps = opts.steps  || 1800;
  const totalAngle = turns * 2 * Math.PI;

  const gGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, Math.min(W,H)*0.46);
  gGrad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(61,122,53,${opts.glowBase || 0.07})`);
  gGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(61,122,53,0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  const lGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(cx - W*0.4, cy, cx + W*0.4, cy);
  lGrad.addColorStop(0, opts.colorA || '#c9a227');
  lGrad.addColorStop(0.5, opts.colorB || '#5aab4d');
  lGrad.addColorStop(1, opts.colorC || '#2a5c25');

  ctx.lineWidth   = opts.lw || 2.2;
  ctx.strokeStyle = lGrad;
  ctx.shadowColor = opts.shadow || '#5aab4d';
  ctx.shadowBlur  = opts.blur   || 8;
  ctx.lineCap     = 'round';

  ctx.beginPath();
  let first = true;
  const total = Math.floor(steps * Math.min(prog, 1));
  for (let i = 0; i <= total; i++) {
    const t = (i / steps) * totalAngle;
    const r = a0 * Math.exp(b * t);
    const x = cx + r * Math.cos(t + Math.PI);
    const y = cy + r * Math.sin(t + Math.PI);
    first ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    first = false;
  }
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
}

/* HERO SPIRAL */
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('hero-spiral');
  const ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
  let prog = 0, pulsePh = 0, done = false;

  function frame() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    if (!done) {
      prog += 0.007;
      if (prog >= 1) { prog = 1; done = true; }
    } else {
      pulsePh += 0.018;
    }
    const glowBase = done ? 0.06 + 0.025 * Math.sin(pulsePh) : 0.07;
    drawGoldenSpiral(ctx, W, H, prog, {
      turns: 4.5, startR: 2, steps: 1800, lw: 2.5,
      glowBase, blur: done ? 10 + 3*Math.sin(pulsePh) : 8,
      colorA: '#c9a227', colorB: '#7cc46d', colorC: '#2a5c25'
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }
  setTimeout(frame, 200);
})();

/* INTERSECTION OBSERVER FADE-UPS */
const fuEls = document.querySelectorAll('.fu');
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('on'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
fuEls.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
true-republic.html HTML ▶ expand 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Manifesto of the True Republic</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg-deep:    #060b06;
      --bg-dark:    #0a120a;
      --bg-mid:     #0f1a0f;
      --green-dark: #2a5c25;
      --green-mid:  #3d7a35;
      --green-hi:   #5aab4d;
      --green-lt:   #7cc46d;
      --gold:       #c9a227;
      --amber:      #e07b1a;
      --cream:      #f0ebe0;
      --warm:       #faf7f0;
      --muted:      #8a9e86;
      --dim:        #5a6a56;
      --serif:      'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
      --sans:       'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body { background: var(--bg-deep); color: var(--cream); font-family: var(--sans); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.75; overflow-x: hidden; }

    /* NAV */
    #nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 1.1rem 3rem; background: rgba(6,11,6,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,171,77,0.14); }
    .nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .65rem; text-decoration: none; }
    .nav-brand-name { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--cream); letter-spacing: .02em; }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--muted); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .09em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color .3s; }
    .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active { color: var(--green-hi); }
    .nav-cta { border: 1px solid var(--green-hi) !important; color: var(--green-hi) !important; padding: .45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 2px; transition: background .3s, color .3s !important; }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--green-hi) !important; color: var(--bg-deep) !important; }
    .nav-burger { display: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
    .nav-burger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--cream); border-radius: 2px; }

    /* HERO */
    #hero { min-height: 100vh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; align-items: center; padding: 8rem 3rem 5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    #hero-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 45%, rgba(201,162,39,.1) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 65%, rgba(42,92,37,.1) 0%, transparent 45%); }
    .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 600px; }
    .eyebrow { display: inline-block; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .hero-h1 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4.5vw, 3.7rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.08; color: var(--warm); margin-bottom: .9rem; }
    .hero-sub { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.28rem); font-style: italic; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
    .hero-desc { font-size: .97rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 2.4rem; max-width: 480px; }
    .hero-desc strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: .85rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .btn-p { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dark), var(--green-hi)); color: var(--warm); border: none; padding: .88rem 1.9rem; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 2px; transition: opacity .3s; display: inline-block; }
    .btn-p:hover { opacity: .85; }
    .btn-s { background: transparent; color: var(--cream); border: 1px solid rgba(240,235,224,.28); padding: .88rem 1.9rem; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .05em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 2px; transition: all .3s; display: inline-block; }
    .btn-s:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
    .hero-canvas-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; z-index: 2; }
    #hero-spiral { width: 100%; max-width: 500px; }

    /* SECTIONS */
    section { padding: 6rem 3rem; position: relative; }
    .container { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .container-wide { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

    .sec-eyebrow { display: inline-block; font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: .8rem; }
    .sec-h2 { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.7rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.12; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
    .prose { font-size: .97rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.9; }
    .prose + .prose { margin-top: 1.2rem; }
    .prose strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
    .prose em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; }

    .pull-quote { border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); padding: 1.2rem 1.8rem; margin: 2rem 0; font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--warm); line-height: 1.55; }
    .pull-quote em { color: var(--green-hi); font-style: normal; }

    /* CREED CARD */
    .creed-card { background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(201,162,39,.07), rgba(42,92,37,.07)); border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,39,.2); border-radius: 3px; padding: 2.8rem; margin: 3rem 0; text-align: center; }
    .creed-line { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--gold); line-height: 1.7; }
